faqs.question: What is the student intake at Royal Global University for DPharm?
faqs.answer: The total number of seats available for the DPharm course of Royal Global University is 60. The seat allotment is based on the applicants' performance in the last qualified exam (Class 12/equivalent) and a personal interview. It must be noted that the mentioned seat intake is taken from the official website of the univeristy/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

college_info.intro:
Royal Global University popular programmes are BTech, BSc, BPharma and MBA. The university offers a BTech programme to students across several specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechatronics, and others. RGU Guwahati BTech students are placed in top companies in various sectors. Further, Royal Global University Guwahati BTech students can work as Web Developers, Data Science Engineers, Robotics Engineers, and others.
Assam Royal Global University is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA programme to students in specialisations, including Finance, Marketing, HRM, Operations, Business Analytics, and others. Royal Global University MBA students can seek higher education and work as Business Analysts, Finance Managers, Compliance Analysts, Market Research Analysts, Investment Bankers, and others. Below-mentioned are Royal Global University Guwahati popular programmes:

placements.overview:
Royal Global University placements 2026 have not been released yet. Royal Global University has a Royal Centre for Corporate Relations (RCCR) that envisages enhancing the placement prospects of the students. The centre grooms students ethically as well as in terms of attitude and aptitude through regular sessions of training, mock GDs and PIs. The official placement report has not been released. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the highest package offered to recently passed-out students was INR 6 LPA and the lowest package during Royal Global University placements stood at INR 2.50 LPA.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Royal Global University offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma courses across various streams such as Agriculture, Engineering, Science, Commerce, Management, and others. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BSc, BPharma, BMLT, BA, BBA, BPT, BCA, and others. At the PG level, the university offers MSc, MA, MCA, MBA, MTech, MSW, MPT, and other programmes to students. Royal Global University fee ranges between INR 1,30,000 - 8,50,000. Royal Global University fee structure for all courses consists of various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee, etc. Among these components, some are to be paid only once during Royal Global University admission. faqs.answer: A:    BPharm fee at Royal Global University can be paid in two instalment plans. Candidates can choose to either pay the total fee in annual instalments or semester-wise instalments. The total RGU Guwahati BPharm fees in both the cases are as follows:In case of yearly instalments of INR 1.73 Lacs per annum: INR 6.92 Lacs + INR 80,000 (one-time fees)In case of semesterly instalments of INR 88,000 per semester: INR 7.04 Lacs + INR 80,000 (one-time fees)NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

Around 4 to 5 Lacs in almost most of the universities charge this fee.The above are only tuition fees.The hostel charge as well as food charge is also around 4 Lakhs.So, overall doing an MBA from RGU costs 8.5 lakh, which is slightly more in comparison to other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It has heart-welcoming infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Specific companies like research, pharmaceutical, and chemical-based sectors are only invited for our discipline for on-campus recruitment. Companies offer an average salary that ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month. More than 30 companies arrive for our discipline.
review_content.Infrastructure: I'm proud to be a part of the biggest university, with versatile facilities and well-known for its service. The management would provide liberty for the students' movement to take part in any of the activities, like sports, college events, internships, or visits. Students' suggestions are appreciated and welcome.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Social Work (MSW) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The review of the social work department at Royal Global University.

review_content.Placements: 2% of students are placed. Internship is in block placement way so all the students get a placement for a month with field experience twice a week, while in block placement, it's one month of field experience. The roles offered in the course are the field work and using the theory in practice through field work.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi in every teacher's staff room. Library is very useful for students who need to work, and it is easily accessible to all students with a good network. In every corner, there is Wi-Fi available, even when the network is down, students can make use of it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Radiography & Advance Imaging Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The Assam Royal Global University is a diamond hidden in the dumps of Assam.

review_content.Placements: About 25% of students got placed. Medical colleges are the top recruiters. About 65% of students got internships. Lab Technician is the top role offered in my course because it is a paramedical course. Things can be improved. .
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, canteens, and infrastructures are of top-notch quality, and the quality of food is reasonable, but one thing that struck me is that the whole university campus is vegetarian. So non-vegetarian food may be a little bit difficult to find, but the taste is not bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: College experience is nice and it will help to build your future.

review_content.Placements: 50 students got their placements. The salary offered was 3 LPA. Company was in good location, and they provided all the requirements of the employees. Maximum number of students got their internship from our course. The top role was maintaining the computer security system.
review_content.Infrastructure: The staffs were very nice. College provided all the requirements of the students like AC, fan, and proper ventilation. The hostel facilities were very good in terms of behaviour. The food was nice and they also provided sports-related things which could help students to freshen their minds in the evening.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In the B.A. In the Political Science course, we have a maximum of 60 students for the whole semester. The salary is Rs. 43,300, which is both the highest and the lowest. Many students get internships in this course at Guwahati University, in various NGOs, research institutes, and government bodies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure include full AC service across the entire university, with a huge auditorium, banking services, classrooms and studios, fine arts studio, fashion studios, incubation centre, legal facilities, moot court, etc. Hostel facilities are also good, with separate accommodations for boys and girls, and the food is totally amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This is the best university for M.Sc. in zoology course.

review_content.Placements: About 66% of the students got placed at the university. The highest wage offered in our study was 25 LPA, and the lowest wage offered was 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Pentagrit, Media Infotech, Achievers Spot, etc. Almost 63% of the students received internships. The higher level roles offered were park range, environment consultant, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus Wi-Fi and infrastructure were mediocre. The zoology department had decent classrooms and an open library. The hostel was mediocre. The quality of mess meal was subpar. The college also offered games and sports. Although it was located far from the department, the hostel was there. It's not decent food.

faqs.answer: The RGU Guwahati BA (English) curriculum is based on the New Education Policy (NEP). It is divided over a period of four years. However, students can opt to exit after the third year. There are two semesters per year and each semester includes various core subjects, Value Addition Courses (VAC), Skill Enhancement Courses (SEC) and Ability Enhancement Courses (AEC). Students must undertake a Dissertation/Research Project in the fourth year and an Internship in the third year.
faqs.question: Q: What is the course structure of BA in English at Royal Global University?

faqs.answer: The Royal Global University provides a space for professional dialogues in the cafeteria, where the students can discuss on topics having coffee. The cafeteria also has an extensive menu. The library is fully computerized and it maintains bibliographic and dictionary databases. The in-campus hostels are equipped with facilities that could help students develop a different lifestyle which involves them in sports, yoga, music based on their individual taste and preferences. They are also equipped with modern hygienic mechanized kitchen with good food.RGU has a Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Squash, Billiards, Table Tennis and a Kabaddi court. The RGU has a moot court for its students to have practical knowledge about the pleading at the court.

course_faqs.question: Is BPharm available at Royal Global University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Royal Global University offers a Bachelor of Pharmacy or BPharm in the full-time mode. It is a four-year programme offered at the UG level. BPharm programme of the university is PCI-approved. The university also offers lateral entry admission directly to the second year of the BPharm programme. The duration of BPharm (Lateral Entry) course is three years. These courses are offered by the university's Royal School of Pharmacy. course_faqs.question: Is RGU - Royal Global University good for MBA?
course_faqs.answer: MBA at The Royal Global University has an overall rating of 5 stars. It has a five star rating for all of its important components such placements, infrastructure, campus life, faculty and value for money. It is a 2 year PG programme. overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee of RGU?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee of RGU is Rs 1,000. It can be submitted either through online mode via net banking /debit card /credit card or through offline mode via DD.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BPharm at Royal Global University?
overview_faqs.answer: BPharm fee at Royal Global University can be paid in two instalment plans. Candidates can choose to either pay the total fee in annual instalments or semester-wise instalments. The total RGU Guwahati BPharm fees in both the cases are as follows:In case of yearly instalments of INR 1.73 Lacs per annum: INR 6.92 Lacs + INR 80,000 (one-time fees)In case of semesterly instalments of INR 88,000 per semester: INR 7.04 Lacs + INR 80,000 (one-time fees)NOTE: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at RGU - Royal Global University expensive?
overview_faqs.answer: MBA at Royal Global University is a 2-year course at the PG level. The course offers admission to 60 students.The total tuition fee for the Royal Global University Master of Business Administration (MBA) is 4.5 lakhs.Which is the average fee structure for an MBA. Around 4 to 5 Lacs in almost most of the universities charge this fee.The above are only tuition fees.The hostel charge as well as food charge is also around 4 Lakhs.So, overall doing an MBA from RGU costs 8.5 lakh, which is slightly more in comparison to other colleges.

review_summary.college_name: Royal Global University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has heart-welcoming infrastructure.

content.Placements: Specific companies like research, pharmaceutical, and chemical-based sectors are only invited for our discipline for on-campus recruitment. Companies offer an average salary that ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month. More than 30 companies arrive for our discipline.
content.Infrastructure: I'm proud to be a part of the biggest university, with versatile facilities and well-known for its service. The management would provide liberty for the students' movement to take part in any of the activities, like sports, college events, internships, or visits. Students' suggestions are appreciated and welcome.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Social Work (MSW) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The review of the social work department at Royal Global University.

content.Placements: 2% of students are placed. Internship is in block placement way so all the students get a placement for a month with field experience twice a week, while in block placement, it's one month of field experience. The roles offered in the course are the field work and using the theory in practice through field work.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi in every teacher's staff room. Library is very useful for students who need to work, and it is easily accessible to all students with a good network. In every corner, there is Wi-Fi available, even when the network is down, students can make use of it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Radiography & Advance Imaging Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The Assam Royal Global University is a diamond hidden in the dumps of Assam.

content.Placements: About 25% of students got placed. Medical colleges are the top recruiters. About 65% of students got internships. Lab Technician is the top role offered in my course because it is a paramedical course. Things can be improved. .
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, canteens, and infrastructures are of top-notch quality, and the quality of food is reasonable, but one thing that struck me is that the whole university campus is vegetarian. So non-vegetarian food may be a little bit difficult to find, but the taste is not bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College experience is nice and it will help to build your future.

content.Placements: 50 students got their placements. The salary offered was 3 LPA. Company was in good location, and they provided all the requirements of the employees. Maximum number of students got their internship from our course. The top role was maintaining the computer security system.
content.Infrastructure: The staffs were very nice. College provided all the requirements of the students like AC, fan, and proper ventilation. The hostel facilities were very good in terms of behaviour. The food was nice and they also provided sports-related things which could help students to freshen their minds in the evening.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Political Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: In the B.A. In the Political Science course, we have a maximum of 60 students for the whole semester. The salary is Rs. 43,300, which is both the highest and the lowest. Many students get internships in this course at Guwahati University, in various NGOs, research institutes, and government bodies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure include full AC service across the entire university, with a huge auditorium, banking services, classrooms and studios, fine arts studio, fashion studios, incubation centre, legal facilities, moot court, etc. Hostel facilities are also good, with separate accommodations for boys and girls, and the food is totally amazing.

admission_overview.college_name: Royal Global University Admission 2022: Application Process, Eligibility Criteria, Entrance Exam, Fees

paragraphs: Royal Global University onlineadmissions are opennow for admission to all the courses. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the university. Royal Global University offers merit /entrance-based admission to around 127 programmes with different specialisations. The university has a total of 27 schools offering various UG, PG, doctoral, certificate, & diploma courses. The total student intake capacity of the university is around 240 students. The university also conducts its entrance test for admission to some programmes. Apart from this, RGU admissions are also based on several other national-level entrance exams. RGU offers up to 100% merit-based scholarships to its students. Over 250 companies have visited the university every year for campus placements. The campus of RGU is equipped with various facilities like library, indoor stadium, separate hostels for boys & girls, and café, etc.

Royal Global University offers online admission for all the programmes. Candidates willing to get admission to the university can apply online on the oficial website of the university. faqs.question: What is the eligibility requirement to take admission at Royal Global University for DPharm?
faqs.answer: Candidates willing to pursue a DPharm at the university must meet the followingRoyal Global University DPharm eligibility criteria:Candidates must have passed Class 12 in the Science stream (PCM/PCB), or an equivalent examination, from a recognised board or councilThey must have studied English as one of the subjectsThey must have scored at least 50% in aggregate in Class 12/equivalent examination and at least 50% in the subjects opted (PCM/PCB)The minimum score required in case of SC/ST/OBC-NCL

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for DPharm admission at Royal Global University?
faqs.answer: No, there is no entrance exam required to take admission at Royal Global University for DPharm. The university shortlists propective students based on their merit in the last qualified exam (Class 12/equivalent). Shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview. Admission offer letters are offered to applicants based on their overall performance in the last qualified exam and the personal interview. Candidates are also required to fulfil the preset eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: When is RGU - Royal Global University application forms out?
faqs.answer: RGU University forms are out usually in April.If you want to apply for the MBA programme at Royal Global University, you usually start the process in April. That's when they release the application form.You need to fill out this form to be considered for the program. It's like applying for a job – you provide your information and why you want to study there. Make sure to keep an eye out for announcements around April, so you don't miss the chance to apply!

faqs.question: Can I join RGU - Royal Global University directly?
faqs.answer: No,It's a admission process that get's u thereGetting into Royal Global University is not easy. They have specific requirements you must meet before they accept you. They want to make sure you're a good fit for their programs.If you get in, you'll learn from great teachers, use advanced facilities, and meet interesting people who can be friends for life.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does RGU - Royal Global University accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: RGU - Royal Global University's MBA admission criteria may include various entrance exams like CAT (Common Admission Test), MAT (Management Aptitude Test), XAT (Xavier Aptitude Test), or RGU's own entrance test. The specific exams accepted can vary each year, and the university may update its requirements. Prospective MBA applicants should consult the university's official website or directly contact the admissions office to obtain the most recent and accurate information regarding accepted entrance exams and their respective score requirements. This ensures that applicants are well-informed about the current admission criteria for the MBA programme at RGU - Royal Global University.

placement_data.title: Royal Global University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Royal Global University has a Royal Centre for Corporate Relations (RCCR) that envisages enhancing the placement prospects of the students. The centre grooms students ethically as well as in terms of attitude and aptitude through regular sessions of training, mock GDs and PIs. The official placement report has not been released. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the highest package offered to recently passed-out students was INR 6 LPA and the lowest package during Royal Global University placements stood at INR 2.50 LPA . In addition to this, the Royal Global University average package stood at INR 3.40 LPA .

faqs.question: What activities are conducted during Royal Global University placement drive?

Some of the activities conducted are as follows: Royal Global University Placements Activities Regular sessions of technical training Grooming sessions for personality development Mock group discussions (GD), personal interviews (PI) and online test practices Personnel from the centre visit potential employers in the industrial and corporate sectors Interactive sessions with corporate houses Industrial tours Workshops on in-demand skills Research paper presentations Interactive sessions with alumni Internship opportunities in government, semi-government and private sector Strong industry interface -

faqs.question: Does Royal Global University provide placement support to BPharm students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Royal Global University provides placement assistance to students enrolled in its BPharm course. The university's placements are managed by its Royal Centre for Corporate Relations (RCCR). RCCR maintains links with various local and national-level recruiters, such as hospitals, community pharmacies, manaufacturing organisations, etc. to provide placement opportunities to BPharm students. It also facilitates the provision of internships for students in various government, semi-government and private oraganisations. Further, students are also provided placement training and pre-placement talks to prepare them for the placement process.

It must be noted that the mentioned seat intake is taken from the official website of the univeristy/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at RGU - Royal Global University expensive?
faqs.answer: MBA at Royal Global University is a 2-year course at the PG level. The course offers admission to 60 students. The total tuition fee for the Royal Global University Master of Business Administration (MBA) is 4.5 lakhs. Which is the average fee structure for an MBA. faqs.question: What is the total DPharm fee at Royal Global University?
faqs.answer: The total DPharm fee at Royal Global University depends on the instalment plan chosen by the students. The total fee for the two-year programme, if paid in semester-wise instalments of INR 76,500, is INR 3.06 lakh. However, candidates can choose to pay the total fee in two yearly instalments of INR 1.5 lakh. The total DPharm fee at RGU Guwahati for such candidates is INR 3 lakh. It must be noted that the mentioned fee information is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative .

hostel_campus.college_name: Royal Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: RGU has Separate in-campus hostels for girls and boys are equipped with adequate facilities which help hostellers to imbibe a different lifestyle which involve them in activities like sports, yoga, music depending on their taste and preferences. Air conditioned hostel having two and three bedded rooms laid out in beautiful clusters offering plenty of buddy time to serve the effervescent mind along with 24 hour electricity, water supply, internet, TV sets, gyms and lifts. Tastefully designed state-of- the-art dinning facility, separate for boys and girls, have been created inside the university campus, equipped with modern hygienic mechanized kitchens offering wholesome and nourishing meals.
facilities: The location and infrastructure of the campus: You should choose a campus that is close to your home, has good connectivity, and offers adequate facili

library.description: RGU Central Library stands today with a digital platform supporting e-resources, a collection of more than 20,000 books in print including reference books covering all the disciplinary areas. The library has good number of national and international journals along with J-GATE online archive and DELNET. With its wide collection of all leading magazines the management also has its own in-house publications. The library is fully computerized and maintains bibliographic & dictionary databases under SOUL and simultaneously maintains its database under institutional ERP.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Squash, Billiards, Table Tennis, Kabaddi court

It provides the students the much needed platform to ease and revitalize for the subsequent sessions. Also, it provides a space for professional dialogue where they can discuss on various areas of interest over a cup of coffee.

The Bistro, Woods Café, F5 and d dhaba offer extensive menu of scrumptious food which is both hygienic and healthy to cater to all tastes.

reviews.review_heading: It has heart-welcoming infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I'm proud to be a part of the biggest university, with versatile facilities and well-known for its service. The management would provide liberty for the students' movement to take part in any of the activities, like sports, college events, internships, or visits. Students' suggestions are appreciated and welcome.

reviews.review_heading: The review of the social work department at Royal Global University.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi in every teacher's staff room. Library is very useful for students who need to work, and it is easily accessible to all students with a good network. In every corner, there is Wi-Fi available, even when the network is down, students can make use of it.

reviews.review_heading: The Assam Royal Global University is a diamond hidden in the dumps of Assam.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, canteens, and infrastructures are of top-notch quality, and the quality of food is reasonable, but one thing that struck me is that the whole university campus is vegetarian. So non-vegetarian food may be a little bit difficult to find, but the taste is not bad.

reviews.review_heading: College experience is nice and it will help to build your future.
reviews.review_text: The staffs were very nice. College provided all the requirements of the students like AC, fan, and proper ventilation. The hostel facilities were very good in terms of behaviour. The food was nice and they also provided sports-related things which could help students to freshen their minds in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure include full AC service across the entire university, with a huge auditorium, banking services, classrooms and studios, fine arts studio, fashion studios, incubation centre, legal facilities, moot court, etc. Hostel facilities are also good, with separate accommodations for boys and girls, and the food is totally amazing.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university for M.Sc. in zoology course.
reviews.review_text: Campus Wi-Fi and infrastructure were mediocre. The zoology department had decent classrooms and an open library. The hostel was mediocre. The quality of mess meal was subpar. The college also offered games and sports. Although it was located far from the department, the hostel was there. It's not decent food.

reviews.review_heading: The course is decent. Some things could be better, but overall it's above average.
reviews.review_text: RGU has a good infrastructure for my course. We have a dedicated animation lab and a classroom. Most of the work is done on our laptops, and we are provided with a well-equipped space that includes plug points. The campus also offers good common rooms, sports facilities, classrooms, and food canteens.

reviews.review_heading: This university has the best infrastructure in the North East, along with good education quality.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is amazing. I don’t think there is any other university in the entire Northeast with this kind of infrastructure. In my field of Biotechnology, I can say it’s a good place to study, with high-tech laboratory facilities and practical sessions.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is great for teaching, classes, extracurricular activities, festivals, events, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Diagnostic laboratory, classroom, hostel, library, canteen, and doctor room are available. Medical facilities, sports, and mess are available. Our college is one of the best colleges in Assam for infrastructure. It is very helpful for us.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and I will recommend students to take admission.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good, and the food provided in the mess is acceptable. I find the hostel food to be lacking in taste. As for sports, my college is commendable since it offers a variety of indoor and outdoor activities. There is a varsity week every year.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very good, comfortable, and peaceful for studies.
reviews.review_text: The hostel accommodation was great, providing many facilities and hygienic food. Daily cleaning of rooms was provided, along with 24-hour electricity supply and clean water. The food quality was also good, and a variety of the Menu was provided during the week. The hostel fee was Rs.2,10,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty (500+), good infrastructure, events, and excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms have their personalised ACs. In hostels, only veg is allowed. The campus keeps various traditions in mind. We have 4+ cafeterias on our campus along with a desert bar, dominos, and more. Many blocks are being constructed and more hostels as well.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus, for sure a good college life and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best in Ghy. Royal is well known for its good campus and top-class infrastructure. Hostels are way too good. We have added a swimming pool and gym this year. The campus is totally veg, and no non-veg items are allowed inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best University for M.Sc. in Mathematics Course.
reviews.review_text: The food in the hotel is delicious, and as the pandemic continues, we don’t need to go out and buy our food. They bring breakfast, lunch, and dinner to our room. The architecture is fantastic, and there are plenty of vantage points on the RGU roof, which looks amazing. Since RGU is located in Assam, it has a lot of greenery and fresh air. You will hear about the world all the time. Wi-Fi is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for the M.Sc. in Botany course.
reviews.review_text: There are no problems with electricity, Wi-Fi is always available, and the quality of the food is excellent. The fitness center is well-maintained, and the gymnasium is excellent. The lab is well maintained, and all equipment is in good working order which helps in learning technical skills. Classrooms are equipped with all the facilities that students need during class time, such as Wi-Fi.

college_info.college_name: Royal Global University

data.description: Yes, Royal Global University provides hostel facilities to its students (boys and girls) on a first come first serve basis, subject to availability of seats. Candidates seeking hostel accomodation must submit a Hostel Form Fee of INR 100, along with the applicable RGU Guwahati hostel fees (which are inclusive of the mess charges) depending on the type of hostel chosen. The university offers 2-seater,  3-seater,  4-seater,  5-seater hostels and dormitories. The annual fees for various hostels range between INR 1.2 Lacs and INR 2.4 lakh. The admission fee of INR 15,000 are common to all the hostels and the dormitory. The mentioned fees are sourced from the official website of the university. They are still subject to chaneg and hence, are indicative.

reviews_list.review_title: Good education, infrastructure, and hospitality.

review_content.Placements: Around 70-80% of the students have been recruited with selection in post-graduation. 100% of the students get internship courses. The highest packages offered in our course have gone more than crores. Around 150 students are placed in my course for every batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by my college are exceptional with top-notch furniture and clean classrooms. The library of our college is exemplary with proper seating arrangements and ventilation provided. The quality of the food provided in the mess and canteen is delicious, healthy, and safe for everyone.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: OVERALL GOOD, Good Falculties, Good Premises and good Hostels.

review_content.Placements: No placements to the hospitals are provided, but the student cutoff rates are always higher as it is one of the best college for dental in Maharashtra, Many students get internship with or without category, so this thing is good abut the college and fee is decreased for many.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and overall good infrastructure, free Wi-Fi are available all the time in the whole campus as well as at hostels, classrooms r well-equipped with Acs, library is best, Labs are also well constructed and it is overall very good college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend it for good teaching with a decent number of patients for clinical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers placements or professional standards for opening the clinic. Almost 98% of students were given internship opportunities. At the end of the course, everyone felt confident enough to open their own private clinic and work with live patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was excellent. It is well planned and connected to nature, with a beautiful garden. Well-built grounds, all sports, and gym equipment were present. The hostel was well built, clean, and spacious. Rooms were furnished, and there was also a salon for girls inside the hostel campus. The library was well-equipped with all the required books and computer facilities. There was a separate library for hostel students. The canteen was also good at serving hygienic food, with proper chairs and tables. Classrooms were spacious, well ventilated, and had projectors. One medical shop was available on campus.

review_summary.college_name: SMBT Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Basic B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College is good. If you want to get admission at this college without any thoughts, go for it.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed on campus. This was good ratio as compared to other colleges. Here minimum salary was Rs 60,000 to Rs 70,000 per month by SMBT Ayurveda Hospital and some other colleges. Mostly students complete their internships at SMBT Ayurveda Hospital, and interns got the chance to do their best.
content.Infrastructure: For dissection of body in college, there were separate classrooms for all batches. 24-hour Wi-Fi and filtered water were available. Library had a big space to study. We had all the courses and related books available. Cleaning was good on campus. In college, building all over was a good choice.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college is very nice because of faculty members, facilities, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college is a dental college so we are doctors or dentists. Our college students who qualify for NEET MS are pursuing MS in various colleges. Some are direct to one clinic. Some are going abroad like Australia, New Zealand, and UAE, and some are joining as lecturers.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and have air conditioning system. Teaching is conducted on a digital board. Department and lab are also well maintained by advanced equipment. Hostel is good and newly renovated. For bathing, warm water facilities are also available. For students, inductions are available for making snacks and nasta.

reviews.review_heading: College is good. If you want to get admission at this college without any thoughts, go for it.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very nice because of faculty members, facilities, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good and have air conditioning system. Teaching is conducted on a digital board. Department and lab are also well maintained by advanced equipment. Hostel is good and newly renovated. For bathing, warm water facilities are also available. For students, inductions are available for making snacks and nasta.

reviews.review_heading: Good education, infrastructure, and hospitality.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by my college are exceptional with top-notch furniture and clean classrooms. The library of our college is exemplary with proper seating arrangements and ventilation provided. The quality of the food provided in the mess and canteen is delicious, healthy, and safe for everyone.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by SMBT Dental College and Hospital, SMBT Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 3 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: OVERALL GOOD, Good Falculties, Good Premises and good Hostels.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and overall good infrastructure, free Wi-Fi are available all the time in the whole campus as well as at hostels, classrooms r well-equipped with Acs, library is best, Labs are also well constructed and it is overall very good college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by SMBT Dental College and Hospital, SMBT Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 23 Sep 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I would recommend it for good teaching with a decent number of patients for clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was excellent. It is well planned and connected to nature, with a beautiful garden. Well-built grounds, all sports, and gym equipment were present. The hostel was well built, clean, and spacious. Rooms were furnished, and there was also a salon for girls inside the hostel campus. The library was well-equipped with all the required books and computer facilities. There was a separate library for hostel students. The canteen was also good at serving hygienic food, with proper cha...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by SMBT Dental College and Hospital, SMBT Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 8 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: I was absolutely satisfied with this good college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms were excellent in our college. The food served in the canteen was good. The quality of food especially breakfast was good. The hygiene of the hostel was good. There was a big sports ground and an attached hospital. The classrooms were enabled with Wi-Fi and speakers. UG and PG hostels were different so no ragging was possible.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by SMBT Dental College and Hospital, SMBT Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 14 Apr 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It provides good teachers and good patient flow for practicals.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were good with projectors and cameras. SMBT campus was around 300 acres. Wi-Fi facilities were also available on campus. It provides a good library with the required books. The gym was also available on the campus. The basketball court, badminton court, and cricket ground were maintained well.

reviews.review_heading: I am in best medical college of Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The library is best place to study, food is good like restaurant I like to connect to Wi-Fi which gives fast speed. I get food which tastes really good. I love the campus nature. Classroom are top class. Good quality infrastructure. Love it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by SMBT Dental College and Hospital, SMBT Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 24 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great college life and wonderful experiences.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel was great, all the basic and necessary facilities were provided by the institution such as hot water during winters and pantry to satisfy our late night cravings rector room for ironing the clothes. A good gymnasium to keep our body fit and all indoor game.

reviews.review_heading: College is really good but it does not provide placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of the college are good. Classrooms are spacious and are always kept clean. Library of the college has a huge area and also has all kind of books related to courses. Labs are equipped with all equipment and accessories. Other necessary facilities are also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: College is in a natural environment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of hostel and mess are very supportive, giving every support required for students. If any problem related to hostel is solved urgently by faculty. Mess's menu is also changing every month. Give a decent meal to student and clean food.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: An excellent college at an average location.

content.Placements: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Government Medical College (ABVGMC) in Vidisha offers a 100% placement rate for its graduates, with a focus on rural services. Graduates typically begin their careers with an average salary of around Rs. 60,000, with opportunities for advancement to medical officer or president positions in hospitals or colleges. It offers a wide range of courses. From MBBS to lab technician. Our seniors have also secured AIR under 100 in NEET PG and many more AIRs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good and well-maintained. It consists of a total of four lecture theatres, which can hold a total strength of 200 students at a time. The building has a plant ecosystem at the centre of each award. Mess is present in the hostel building itself.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Medical College ranks 6th in Madhya Pradesh.

content.Placements: 100% of all students graduated from the college get placed in rural services. Placements are to be done after the internship. On average, the salary is around 50,000 to 60,000 rupees for the entry level monthly. Later, you can apply for medical officer or residency positions in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Medical College has separate departments. The college infrastructure is fantastic. The college has separate hostels for girls and boys, as well as a hostel for faculty. The college also has cricket, volleyball, and football grounds, along with a gym.

description: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26279 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26279 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16572 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 82550 to 110496. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were M.D. in Community Medicine, followed by M.D. in Forensic Medicine. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 82550 and 110496, respectively.
For the students belonging to the OBC category, the NEET PG Round 4 closing was 112308.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College MD cutoff 2025 was released across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for different categories under the Home State quota. As per the Round 2 cutoff data, the top two most competitive MD specialisations for admission were MD in General Medicine and M.D. in Obstetrics and Gynaecology, with MP NEET PG cutoff ranks of 4176 and 8363, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: An excellent college at an average location.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good and well-maintained. It consists of a total of four lecture theatres, which can hold a total strength of 200 students at a time. The building has a plant ecosystem at the centre of each award. Mess is present in the hostel building itself.

reviews.review_heading: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Medical College ranks 6th in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Medical College has separate departments. The college infrastructure is fantastic. The college has separate hostels for girls and boys, as well as a hostel for faculty. The college also has cricket, volleyball, and football grounds, along with a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely great college overall from infrastructure to faculty.
reviews.review_text: New and super infrastructure as the college started in 2018, and labs are full of equipment, and classrooms are big to accommodate 180 students. The library is very big and hygienic, offering a large spectrum of books for medical students. Hostels are good with each room accommodating 3 students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure facilities in our college are too good. There are new buildings which are very well equipped and have furnished rooms. Lecture theatres are air-conditioned with a huge seating capacity and a perfect operating system for lectures. We have our hospital and library, both are integrally connected with the college and are very well-equipped with a good count of patient beds in the hospital. We are attached with a district hospital at Vidisha. There are different grounds for outdoor gam...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very beautiful garden and there is greenery on campus.
reviews.review_text: Our institute and hostel are well furnished, and there are multiple buildings for different departments and have good space between the building. There is fully Wi-Fi support and excellent quality of laboratories with digital classrooms and the e-library is fully established with fully air-conditioned. The food served in mess is good, hygiene, and taste.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The institute is well-furnished. There are multiple buildings for different departments. There is a good space between the buildings. Our college is fully Wi-Fi enabled. It has excellent quality labs, digital classrooms, and a fully air-conditioned e-library. There is a good mess with hygienic food and water supply.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very kind and highly educated.
reviews.review_text:
The institute is well furnished and multiple building for different departments and have good space between the building the fully Wi-Fi excellent quality labs with digital classrooms and e-library with fully air-conditioned. 
Good mess with hygienic food and water supply.

reviews.review_heading: Best medical college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of classroom is very nice. Fully furnished lecture halls with working highspeed Wi-Fi and air conditioning. Central library is also very big. Hostel is also very spacious and food quality is excilent medical facilities are also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice college campus and environment
reviews.review_text: All good facilities are available in our college. The quality facilities are various excellent labs, classrooms, library, canteen, etc. Wi-Fi facility is tremendous to realise every concept. At last, the quality of food is far much better than other colleges and the hostel environment is pretty good too.

review_content.Placements: Our college usually provides internships in the LL.B. course in local courts or under advocates for a better experience in the field. They try to provide as many students as they can, the rest depend on students' own choice and their skills. The percentage of students who get jobs and internships lies between 80 and 90 percent.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of IIMT is really good and a quite big enough campus we have there. We have spacious classrooms, a different library for each department, and Wi-Fi is also available in each building. Classes are air-conditioned, which is a really good thing, especially in the summer.

faqs.answer: IMT Noida was established in 1994 and is approved by AICTE, the Pharmacy Council of India, and the Bar Council of India. IIMT was established under the aegis of the Association of Management Studies and is accredited by NAAC and NBA. Some of the colleges under the IIMT Group of Colleges are affiliated with Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, the Board of Technical Education, Uttar Pradesh, and Chaudhary Charan Singh University. The placements are ongoing for the Class of 2023. Earlier, the the highest and average package offered during IIMT Noida placements 2022 stood at INR 32.05 LPA and INR 4.88 LPA, respectively. Further, 480 recruiters participated in the placement process and selected 1,200 students in various sectors viz., Consulting, BFSI, FMCG, etc. The top recruiters of IIMT Greater Noida in 2022 included Accenture, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, EY, KPMG, PwC, etc.
faqs.question: Q: Is IIMT Noida good for MBA?

faqs.answer: The students seeking to take admission in the MBA course at IIMT Greater Noida should have successfully completed their under-graduation degree from a recgonised university withat least 50% aggregate. Since, the admission in this college is based on the score of entrance exam therefore, the students are expected to have valid scores in the accepted entrance exams such as CUET-PG, CAT, SNAP, etc. and
faqs.question: Q: How can I be eligible for taking admission in the IIMT Greater Noida MBA?

faqs.answer: Major topics included in any BSc (CS) undergraduate degree course are either offered as core subjects or as an elective subjects. These subjects are essential to develop knowledge base in BSc (CS). The subjects are as follows:Introduction to Data StructuresNumerical AnalysisSystem Software System ProgrammingPython ProgrammingIntroduction to Web Technology
faqs.question: Q: What are the subjects taught in BSc (CS) at IIMT Greater Noida?

faqs.answer: The modes of IIMT Greater Noida admission are online and offline. Admission to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses is based on merit and entrance exam scores. At the undergraduate level, the IIMT Group of Colleges offers three to four-year BTech, three-year BSc, BCA, and other courses to students. At the postgraduate level, the IIMT College Greater Noida offers two-year MBA, MCA, and various other courses to students. IIMT College also provides Diploma and other courses to students. The seats for all these courses are limited, hence the candidates must apply early.Check the Other Top Private Universities in Delhi/NCR

course_faqs.question: If any BPharm student qualifies for two categories of scholarship/award is he/she entitled to get both?
course_faqs.answer: If a BPharm student secured 97% in his/her class and also hold topper position in the university merit list then, he/she will be entitled for only one awards whichever is higher. That means the student will get award according to the topper of the university merit list.

course_faqs.question: Does IIMT Greater Noida provides any central and state scholarship for BPharm students?
course_faqs.answer: IIMT Greater Noida is affiliated with CCSU (Chaudhary Charan Singh University) and AKTU (Abdul Kalam Technical University), these both universities supports Central and State scholarships for various UG & PG courses. IIMT follows rules and regulation of its affiliated universities. However, provision of Central and State scholarship is not explicitly mentioned on college’s official website.

course_faqs.question: What is the primary goal of IIMT Greater Noida BPharm programme?
course_faqs.answer: The main goal of Bachelor in Pharmacy at IIMT Greater Noida is to develop an understanding in students regarding their responsibilities as pharma professional and to provide the students with the ability so that they can excel in field of pharmacy and its related fields for the pharmaceutical industry and research.

course_faqs.question: What is the criteria of selection for IIMT Greater Noida BPharm Scholarships
course_faqs.answer: Different courses at IIMT Greater Noida have their own scholarship criteria. For the BPharm course, students need to be the top performer in their branch, have at least 75% attendance, and be in a branch with at least 40 students. If students caught in any acts of indiscipline, the scholarship won't be awarded.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing B.Tech at IIMT Greater Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, it is worth pursuing BTech at IIMT Group of College as it is one of the renowned colleges in Greater Noida to offer education in the Engineering field. IIMT is approved by AICTE, the Pharmacy Council of India, and the Bar Council of India. The college was established under the aegis of the Association of Management Studies and is accredited by NAAC and NB. Further, the college has a panel of guest lecturers to inspire students in their respective careers and to give them tips and invaluable insights in every course.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BBA at IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: Fee for BBA at IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida is as follows :First year = 79000Second year = 79000Third year = 79000The BBA course at IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida is provided by the CCS UNIVERSITY. Number of seats for BBA and BCA is 240, BJMC is 120 and B.Com is 60. IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida college ranked as top 55 colleges in NIRF Ranking NIRF, Ministry of HRD. Ranked among top 20 emerging B-Schools of India by Chronicle 12th All India B-School Survey 2022 Ranked 10th in Excellence Category and 10th in Northern Region in GHRDC BCA College Survey 2022. Ranked among top 75 colleges in India by Times of India 2020.

overview_faqs.question: Is IIMT Noida good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: IMT Noida was established in 1994 and is approved by AICTE, the Pharmacy Council of India, and the Bar Council of India. IIMT was established under the aegis of the Association of Management Studies and is accredited by NAAC and NBA. Some of the colleges under the IIMT Group of Colleges are affiliated with Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, the Board of Technical Education, Uttar Pradesh, and Chaudhary Charan Singh University. The placements are ongoing for the Class of 2023. Earlier, the the highest and average package offered during IIMT Noida placements 2022 stood at INR 32.05 LPA and INR 4.88 LPA, respectively. Further, 480 recruiters participated in the placement process and selected 1,200 students in various sectors viz., Consulting, BFSI, FMCG, etc. The top recruiters of IIMT Greater Noida in 2022 included Accenture, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, EY, KPMG, PwC, etc.

review_summary.college_name: IIMT Greater Noida Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: All over, good college, good infrastructure and good campus life.

content.Placements: Placement is very good for those students who studied very well, and placement is good. The highest package is 44 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The percentage of students who placed is 83%. Top recruiters include companies like Paytm, Axis Bank, EY, and all in CSE (AI). The package is high compared to the CSE core.
content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel facility. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. A gym is available. The quality of food is not very good because it is not nutritious. The canteen meal is overall good, but the prices of canteen food are high, not too high but still high. Sports activities include cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with my college. The facilities are great here.

content.Placements: Placement is very good. They provide placement in the 3 to 5 LPA range normally, but in some other cases, it goes near 10 to 12 LPA. Event management, HR (human resources), event planner, manager, business analytics, and business development roles are offered. The maximum number of students is placed every year.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are great. The infrastructure is really nice. The library is also very good. Canteens are kept neatly. We have two hostels, one for boys and one for girls. We also have 4 canteens which provide a variety of food, including Chinese, continental, South Indian, and beverages.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My raw and uncut review of my college.

content.Placements: Our college usually provides internships in the LL.B. course in local courts or under advocates for a better experience in the field. They try to provide as many students as they can, the rest depend on students' own choice and their skills. The percentage of students who get jobs and internships lies between 80 and 90 percent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of IIMT is really good and a quite big enough campus we have there. We have spacious classrooms, a different library for each department, and Wi-Fi is also available in each building. Classes are air-conditioned, which is a really good thing, especially in the summer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best college in India: IIMT Group of Institutes, Greater Noida.

content.Placements: In Information Technology, placement is not very high but still good, around 70-80%. So, it’s a good choice even if you choose B.Tech at IIMT Greater Noida. The education system provided by IIMT Greater Noida group of institutes is professional and focused.
content.Infrastructure: Best features available on campus are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, where everyone has free access to the Wi-Fi connection. So, it’s the best option available on campus. You also have access to Wi-Fi in your hostel room or can use free internet.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with the faculty, classrooms, and events organised by the college.

content.Placements: I am 1st year B.Tech CSE AI student. I have seen my seniors who passed out this year, and they get an average package that ranges from 6-7 LPA. Many students get a package of more than 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Accenture, Amazon, Just Dial, Toppr, and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: There is a separate building for each branch and course. Wi-Fi is good in speed. Each class contains projectors and a smart board for students. Labs are fully furnished. The PPS lab is fully air-conditioned, and the electrical and electronic labs have all the equipment for experiments. The mechanical lab is very big and contains all the equipment. The food quality of the hostel is quite satisfactory, and not too bad. The medical room is available with a doctor. An ambulance is also available in case of an emergency.

admission_overview.college_name: IIMT Greater Noida Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: IIMT Group of Colleges admission 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BSc, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG levels. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers diploma courses. To get admission to the IIMT Group of Colleges, candidates must have a valid entrance exam score, such as JEE Main, JEECUP etc., as per the respective course. The university offers more than 25 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Law, Science etc. The college is also affiliated withAKTUandCCS University Meerut, Read the following article to know more aboutIIMT Greater Noida course admission2025.

The mode of study at IIMT Greater Noida is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions at IIMT Noida, candidates must complete the last educational qualification as per the respective course for the selection process. Read on to know more aboutIIMT College, Greater Noida,course admissions2025.

IIMT Noida courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam/ merit-based. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularIIMT College, Greater Noida courses:

IIMT Group of Colleges admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to thCollegeseir preferred course. The admission process at IIMT Group of Collegesy is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: IIMT Group of Collegesy Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website (https://www.iimtindia.net) for admission to the various programme. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, GPAT, CUET etc for admission to the BPharma, MPharma, MBA among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release ofIIMT Group of Collegesy cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theIIMT Group of Colleges feeto confirm their seats in the university

The final placements at IIMT Greater Noida are a result of very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students.

IIMT Greater Noida has concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during IIMT Greater Noida placements 2025 stood at INR 1.8 Crore per annum. This package was offered by Sale Force. The second-highest package offered stood at INR 80 LP A. The top recruiters of IIMT Greater Noida in 2025 included Sales Force, Ansys, Classplus, TCS, HCL Technology, Nagarro, LTI Mindtree, etc.

hostel.description: The Institute has 4 hostels available for boys and girls separately with more than 800 rooms in total having the capacity of 1600 students on a twin-sharing basis. Other facilities include dining halls, indoor games, exercising equipments, communication center with internet facility and sports fields for outdoor games.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis Room, Pool Table, Kabaddi, Kho-Kho, Chess

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Robotics Lab, Pharmacy Lab, Journalism Lab, Antenna & Wave Propagation Lab, Logic Design Lab

reviews.review_heading: All over, good college, good infrastructure and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel facility. 24/7 Wi-Fi is available. A gym is available. The quality of food is not very good because it is not nutritious. The canteen meal is overall good, but the prices of canteen food are high, not too high but still high. Sports activities include cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with my college. The facilities are great here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are great. The infrastructure is really nice. The library is also very good. Canteens are kept neatly. We have two hostels, one for boys and one for girls. We also have 4 canteens which provide a variety of food, including Chinese, continental, South Indian, and beverages.

reviews.review_heading: My raw and uncut review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of IIMT is really good and a quite big enough campus we have there. We have spacious classrooms, a different library for each department, and Wi-Fi is also available in each building. Classes are air-conditioned, which is a really good thing, especially in the summer.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in India: IIMT Group of Institutes, Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: Best features available on campus are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, where everyone has free access to the Wi-Fi connection. So, it’s the best option available on campus. You also have access to Wi-Fi in your hostel room or can use free internet.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the faculty, classrooms, and events organised by the college.
reviews.review_text: There is a separate building for each branch and course. Wi-Fi is good in speed. Each class contains projectors and a smart board for students. Labs are fully furnished. The PPS lab is fully air-conditioned, and the electrical and electronic labs have all the equipment for experiments. The mechanical lab is very big and contains all the equipment. The food quality of the hostel is quite satisfactory, and not too bad. The medical room is available with a doctor. An ambulance is also available in ...

reviews.review_heading: IIMT College is the best college, but there is only one issue with placement.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent. The college is well-facilitated. There are many facilities for students, such as a library, canteen, and free internet throughout the campus. Every classroom has digital boards. Washrooms are clean, and the staff is helpful. There are many more facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of helpful faculty members, good placements, and great college campus.
reviews.review_text: College campus has free Wi-Fi facilities for all the students. There are air-conditioned labs and libraries making it comfortable for students to study. College campus is quite big with a lot of greenery and with garden. There are also many sports grounds on college campus for sports like cricket, basketball, and kho-kho.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure at IIMT College of Engineering include academic facilities like well-equipped classrooms, modern labs, a robust Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and a library with over 2,00,000 books and journals. We have separate hostels for boys and girls with air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. It provides a hygienic environment and essential amenities. Mess and canteen offer decent and nutritious meals with a variety of options. Sports facilities include indoor and outdoor game...

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed due to the lack of good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college is good with decent classrooms, proper seating arrangements and a good Wi-Fi facility across the campus. The library is well-maintained and offers a variety of books. Yet, the labs need some improvement as some equipment is outdated or not functioning properly. The hostel facilities are average, and the food in the mess is manageable but could be improved in both quality and variety. Sports facilities are available but limited.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good but students need to work on themselves
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Wi-Fi is only available in the library, not in classrooms. The quality of food is also not satisfactory. The hostel is comparable to those at other colleges, but there are issues with Wi-Fi connectivity. Medical facilities are inadequate, and the sports facilities are the worst I have ever seen.

reviews.review_heading: The college focuses on the student's skills and education.
reviews.review_text: Facilites in hostels are personal lockers for storming your belongings, shared common areas, bathroom and showers, free Wi-Fi, access to washing machines, locally sourced meals (breakfast, lunch, and dinner ), and oragnise social events such as trips or social nights. Hostels are the best services providing hostels. The food is also delicious, and the wardens take care of students like their own kids.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and the infrastructure is nice.
reviews.review_text: Classroom infrastructure is good. There are labs in all the departments and classrooms are also good with smart board facilities. There is also a library in which we can issue the books and all the departments have Wi-Fi also. The food quality of the mess is good, and all the facilities are good at the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a lot of facilities like better cafeteria canteens, and neat and clean classrooms, and the infrastructure of our college is the best. I am happy to take admission here; the infrastructure is so big. Our college provides us with library facilities, Wi-Fi, and labs. They teach us Tally and Excel.

reviews.review_heading: IIMT steps further into the future.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is quite good, but I would not recommend the college hostel. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel has facilities, but they are not up to the expected standards. The food is sometimes hygienic and may not suit the tastes of many. I recommend renting a room or opting for a PG nearby, as there are several options available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It has good Wi-Fi, a good library, and good classrooms. Everything is good. I think the mess food is bad. I do not stay at the hostel. Medical facilities are average. Labs are good, and the computer lab is also good. The transportation facility is good.

college_info.college_name: IIMT Greater Noida

data.description: IIMT Group of Colleges, Greater Noida, is committed to providing a value-driven culture and creating a professional environment. It strives to impart knowledge in engineering , management, education, law, pharmacy , and so on, with its highly qualified and experienced faculty members in their respective functional areas.

My college gives proper attention to students on training and placement, our college call reputed and well known companies for placement and most of the students are placed.

The hostel facilities are good, the food is very tasty, and a canteen is also available.

They use the simple method as well as a technical method as per students can learn what they want to teach and best for a student.

college_info.college_name: IIMT Greater Noida Scholarship Details

paragraphs: IIMT Greater Noida offers several merit and need-based scholarships under all the programmes. Apart from these scholarships, candidates can also avail of scholarships worth INR 3 crore under multiple streams. It is one of the best colleges that distributes around INR 3 Crore scholarships every year to students in order to motivate them. The college offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. The course-wise details regarding IIMT Greater Noida scholarships are mentioned below:
Scholarships for BTech/ BPharm Students:

MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Cognizant, BNY Mellon, TCS, and many others. MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, and others. Students are taught case studies, internships, panel discussions, hands-on sessions, and others. BSc and MBA students are taught by PhD, diploma, and degree holders. BSc and MBA students are provided with various facilities such as a library, big conference halls, wifi facilities, and others. faqs.question: Where are Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women alumni placed?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to a majority of postgraduate and integrated postgraduate level courses at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women is subject to CUET UG and CUET PG exams. Further, for MBA, university accepts various entrance exam scores, such as MAT/CMAT/CAT/XAT/TANCET/ATMA. In addition to this, candidates are required to fill out the basic eligiblity criteria set by the college. Candidates seeking admission to Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women can apply for these exams and then apply to the university with a valid score.
faqs.question: Can I join Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women offers various courses at UG, PG and doctoral level. The below-mentioned course fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative. The total tuition fee for all the courses is given below:CoursesTuition FeesMBAINR 4,400 - INR 5,600MScINR 4,400BScINR 3,900MAINR 3000BVocINR 3,900BComINR 3,900BAINR 3,900 - INR 30,800MAINR 4,400 - INR 26,700BCAINR 3,900BBAINR 3,900
faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women student must pass Class 10 and Class 12 with 55% aggreagte to apply for admission. Further, candidates are required to apply and appear in CUET-UG to  grab the seat.
faqs.question: What is eligibility to take admission in B.Com at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women?

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot join Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women directly. The university offers admission on the basis of entrance examinations:  CUET-UG: For UG candidatesCUET-PG: For PG candidatesBE and ME: For interested candidatesCandidates must apply for the course through online or offline mode. They must also fulfill the university's eligibility criteria.  Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women is also known as Avinashilingam University. It is a women's institution in Coimbatore. It was established in 1988 by Avinashilingam Education Trust.  The university offers UG courses like B.Com, BBA, BE, and B.Ed. It also offers PG courses like ME, MBA, M.Com, MSc, and MA.

review_content.Placements: Maximum from valuable departments get placed in estimated companies and get a reasonable salary. There are highest and also average packages offered in Zoology. It is advised to continue M.Sc. After some exams, you can become an officer. Internships are there for UG students which is very useful.
review_content.Infrastructure: Whichever course you opt for they have heights laboratories and infrastructure with all the facilities in all the course. Wi-Fi is available for research purposes and libraries have a wide range collection of books. It has a peaceful environment for studying.
