reviews_list.review_title: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our course is 60%. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 4.25. Top recruiting companies for our course are Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, etc. Totally 80% of students got internships in various startup companies, and students who got placed will get internships in their respective selected companies. Top roles offered are data analyst, software developer, and graduate trainee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available are good like Wi-Fi connectivity, classrooms, drinking water facilities, library, canteen, a vast volume of books, learning materials, etc. Food quality is good in the canteen and also in the mess of hostel. The medical room is available. There is also a sick room on campus for taking rest. Sports and games are well-supported and encouraged here.

faqs.answer: Admission to a majority of postgraduate and integrated postgraduate level courses at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women is subject to CUET UG and CUET PG exams. Further, for MBA, university accepts various entrance exam scores, such as MAT/CMAT/CAT/XAT/TANCET/ATMA. In addition to this, candidates are required to fill out the basic eligiblity criteria set by the college. Candidates seeking admission to Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women can apply for these exams and then apply to the university with a valid score.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: Yes, Avinashilingam University Coimbatore is good for MBA. MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Cognizant, BNY Mellon, TCS, and many others. MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, and others. Students are taught through case studies, internships, panel discussions, hands-on sessions, and others.
faqs.question: Q: Is Avinashilingam University, Coimbatore good for MBA?

faqs.answer: No, Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women offers entrance-based admission to MSc. Candidates are required to apply and appear for the accepted entrance exam i.e. CUET PG. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to apply on the official website of CUET PG and visit university official website to submit the score for admission. After all the procedures the university releases its merit list. If the candidates are shortlisted on merit they are required to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.
faqs.question: Q: Can I take direct admission for M.Sc at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women?

faqs.answer: Yes, Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women offers BSc programme with various specilisations. The university offers four-year duration BSc courses. Candidates looking for admission to BSc are required to fill out the basic eligiblity criteria set by the college i.e pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Further, candidates are required to apply and appear for CUET UG to grab the seat.

overview_faqs.question: Is Avinashilingam University, Coimbatore good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Avinashilingam University Coimbatore is good for MBA. MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Cognizant, BNY Mellon, TCS, and many others. MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, and others. Students are taught through case studies, internships, panel discussions, hands-on sessions, and others.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Sc available in Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women offers BSc programme with various specilisations. The university offers four-year duration BSc courses. Candidates looking for admission to BSc are required to fill out the basic eligiblity criteria set by the college i.e pass Class 12 from a recognised board. Further, candidates are required to apply and appear for CUET UG to grab the seat.

overview_faqs.question: Is a degree from Avinashilingam University valid?
overview_faqs.answer: Avinashilingam University Coimbatore is accredited with A+ Grade by NAAC (National Assessment and Accreditation Council) and is approved by UGC (University Grants Commission). Avinashilingam University Coimbatore Tamil Nadu, through various schools of study, offers UG, PG, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Interior Design and Resource Management and various other streams. The degree offered by this university is valid everywhere in India.

review_summary.college_name: Avinashilingam University Coimbatore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Textile Dyeing and Printing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Actually not that much placements are given by our college.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students got placed. The average salary was Rs 10,000 per month. Zimzon was the recruiting company. 5% of students got internships in printing. Actually, this is a great college to study for a small amount of money. Studying in this college is good with a small amount of money to invest in studies and no more coming for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Actually, it was a great infrastructure and also had great labs. It provided super food sometimes. There was great infrastructure. We had a great library. We study in the evening in library. There was a good auditorium. There was super food in the canteen. There were clean restrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Rural Development and Sociology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really Good infrastructure and facilities to learn.

content.Placements: This course provided opportunities for most of students to be placed in government organizations, NGOs, government departments, etc. It provided internship opportunities to gain field-level experience in district administration through the District Collectorate, rural administration through Panchayats, and social work through collaboration with various best-running NGOs.
content.Infrastructure: The campus was clean and eco-friendly, with adequate classrooms and labs. Department-specific resources like rural development models, maps, and survey tools were available. The library was well-stocked with rural studies, development theory, and sociological texts. The quality of food was somewhat good. A medical room and doctors were also available to treat any sick students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the institution.

content.Placements: Maximum from valuable departments get placed in estimated companies and get a reasonable salary. There are highest and also average packages offered in Zoology. It is advised to continue M.Sc. After some exams, you can become an officer. Internships are there for UG students which is very useful.
content.Infrastructure: Whichever course you opt for they have heights laboratories and infrastructure with all the facilities in all the course. Wi-Fi is available for research purposes and libraries have a wide range collection of books. It has a peaceful environment for studying.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our course is 60%. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 4.25. Top recruiting companies for our course are Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, etc. Totally 80% of students got internships in various startup companies, and students who got placed will get internships in their respective selected companies. Top roles offered are data analyst, software developer, and graduate trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available are good like Wi-Fi connectivity, classrooms, drinking water facilities, library, canteen, a vast volume of books, learning materials, etc. Food quality is good in the canteen and also in the mess of hostel. The medical room is available. There is also a sick room on campus for taking rest. Sports and games are well-supported and encouraged here.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The title of the review is Rabika.

content.Placements: A very high percentage of students enrolled in my course, with more than 90% of them participating. The highest salary packages offered for my course ranged from 12 LPA to 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in India hired students from my college. About 30% of students in this course secured internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in my college were excellent, including Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library, all accessible to every student. The food quality in my college was superb and delicious. However, medical facilities were not available on campus. Sports and games facilities were provided.

admission_process.title: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission is open for all the courses. Admission to all the UG and PG courses is entrance-based. Applicants can apply for the course of their choice online on the university's official website.Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Womenoffers many courses under UG, PG, and doctoral levels under various streams, such as Arts, Science, and Humanities. All the information related to the Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission 2024 is available in the following segments:

Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission to all the courses is entrance-based. The college offers various UG, PG and PhD courses. Candidates seeking admission to any courses at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and appear for the selection process accepted by the college. The basic eligibility for UG is to passClass 10 and Class 12from a recognised board and pass UG and PG degrees for admission to PG and PhD courses, respectively. Check out the table below for Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women courses, along with their eligibility and selection:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Pass Class 12 from a recognised board
Pass graduation degree
Class 12 from a recognised board
Check here to know more aboutAvinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women courses

Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission process begins with filling out the registration form. Applicants seeking admission to any courses must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university. Want to know complete details about the Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women admission process 2025, go through the following section.
Step 1: Application Process

Applicants looking forward to admission to various programmes at Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women must fill up the admission form online by visiting the official website of the college. Application forms cannot be submitted without uploading the required documents.
Step 2: Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the applicants must have passed Class 12 for admission to UG and a graduation degree for admission to PG. Additionally, for all the courses, applicants must appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university and score well. The university releases the shortlisted candidates’ list for all the courses based on their scores in entrance exams.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women will release a merit list of the selected applicants for all courses for the final seat allotment.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
The selected applicants must make theAvinashilingam Institute for Home Science & Higher Education for Women feepayment within the given deadline to secure their seats.

placement_data.title: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: Over 102 companies visited the institute campus during the 2023 placements. The total count of offers made to the 2023 batch of BTech , MBA , MA , and other courses was 936 . The overall highest package offered during Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women placements 2023 was INR 9.50 LPA and the lowest package stood at INR 2.50 LPA .

The institute has a Career Guidance and Placement Cell that organises various training, placement and internship activities. The cell first understands the students' interest towards higher education, seeking jobs and interest towards competitive exams. Over 120 hours of exclusive competitive exam training is provided to 70 students, who have registered for SSC Exams.

nirf.description:
Avinashilingam has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Avinashilingam's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Avinashilingam fell 1 rank to #99 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

There are no proper sports facilities given to students who are not players.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my classroom and library were very good; everything is available in my college. The quality of food made in my canteen was so good. Medical and games as well as sports facilities are available for the students in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women in M.Sc. Botany in 2025.
reviews.review_text: In this college, many facilities are provided like Fast Wi-Fi Connection, Clean Bathroom, Available Multiple Branches in Classroom, every student has a computer in Labs, Library, etc. Facilities are provided by the college. This college has a sports committee and gym khana committee that organises every year games and sports tournaments for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and environment is very well.
reviews.review_text: The environment of the college is very beautiful, well decorated, and pleasant. There are well-equipped classrooms, a large library, and some auditorium rooms. Apart from this, students have separate classrooms for teaching practice. There is no hostel facility here, but rooms are available nearby at very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Really good teachers, placements and infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is available, as is the biggest library, comfortable lab facilities, and high-tech classrooms. We have clinic our college campus. The NCC candidates put the independence day parade in New Delhi. Football, volleyball, etc. are played here. The infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect college for women with great infrastructure and faculty members in Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were really in good condition. We had lights and fans in all the classrooms. The benches were well-furnished too. We have a smart board for PPT presentations. We have a department library for our course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: Very poor hostel and some good infrastructure. The hostel is very strict and students are not allowed to do anything without the consent of their parents. Outside foods are strictly not allowed in our college hostel. A vegetarian meal is provided for hostellers and they conduct prayer every morning .

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and highly knowledgeable teachers.
reviews.review_text: We have labs for all subjects, each highly equipped with new instruments. Our classrooms can accommodate up to 50 students and feature digital boards that facilitate understanding through visual examples.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for girls to equip themselves with excellent skills and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Excellent facilities and a learning environment are worth the effort. Hostel food was okay (only vegetarian meals). Laboratories and classrooms were well maintained and cleaned. Sports were given ample importance and the infrastructure was just awesome. In addition, the facility at NCC is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Avinashilingam Institute for Home Science and Higher Education for Women.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Computer labs are available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Smart boards and projectors are available in classrooms. The library is kept up-to-date. They provide newspapers daily. We need an ID card to scan the barcode to borrow a book from the library. Sports and games are considered the most important. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food in the hostel is good.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indira Gandhi Medical College and Hospital a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi Medical College and Hospital is a well-known institution for MBBS, DM, M.Ch., PG Diploma, MD, MS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Indira Gandhi Medical College and Hospital has a rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 4.7 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Indira Gandhi Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great College. Great Legacy. Great Location and Lots of Clinical Exposure. Lacks in Campus.

content.Placements: Since it is a medical college, there are no placements in our college. But most of the students who graduate from our college and want to do a job get a job in the private sector if they want. Internship is mandatory for a period of 1 year with a stipend of 20,000.
content.Infrastructure: Since Shimla is a hill area, there is a shortage of land for an adequate campus. Our campus is good. Wi-Fi is only available in the library. Classrooms are good with modern facilities. There is a shortage of 2 lecture theatres. Single rooms for boys. Only 23 students will get rooms in the first year. The rest of the students will get hostels in the 2nd year. Girls' hostel has double occupancy rooms, and they get single rooms in the final year. Mess food is good in the boys' hostel but bad in the girls' hostel. The location of the hostel is very good. The girls' hostel is near Ride, and the boys' hostel is in Sanjauli. Water purifiers and geysers are good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with great medical exposure and very helpful beforehand experience.

content.Placements: There are no placements in medical colleges as such. I mean it's not like engineering colleges where companies come to the campus. It is more of an individual hustle where either you can work as an MO I. e medical officer post MBBS but for that too you have to give an exam. Or you can try for post graduation and apply for residence and ofcourse for that too you have to give an exam.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel and infrastructure in igmc are quite typical. Sports like volleyball, football and table tennis are available in the hostel. Mess facilities are also good. There is no canteen in the hostel. There are single bedrooms for each individual in the boys hostel whereas girls have double bedrooms as they live in sharing.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college with a beautiful campus.

content.Placements: Placements are good with decent salary packages. The highest salary package offered by the private sector was 25 LPA. The average salary package offered by the government sector was 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are great. The infrastructure is good. Hostel facilities are also good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is very relevant. Semester exams are not tough.
content.Other: I am not satisfied with its transportation facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college, with good doctors and facilities.

content.Placements: There were 100 students in a batch till 2018 batch, and it is 120 students from 2019 onwards. The income varies depending on whether it is a government job or private and also depends on where you are posted. Internships are provided by the college, and it is for 1 year. Overall, it is a good college.
content.Infrastructure: A library is available. A reading room is available 24 hours. The classrooms are big enough and have smart screens. There is a badminton court inside and an auditorium for functions. Every year, different functions are organised, and classes are taken by teachers regularly.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has amazing college life and good placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50-60% of the students got placed via interviews in the state government-run PHCs and CHCs. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 30,000 to 40,000 per month based on the post. After passing out, students are posted as medical officers. The rest of the students either start their post-graduation, some opt for foreign medical exams, or some opt for a drop year to prepare for NEET PG and INI CET.
content.Infrastructure: Our college and hospital are situated 2-3 km away from the boys and girls hostel. The college contains 5 lecture theatres, an auditorium, a cafeteria, a library cum reading room, a badminton court, dissection hall, pathology lab, pharmacology lab, physiology lab, biochemistry lab, microbiology lab and forensic lab. The hospital contains various departments of their respective specialties.

description: Indira Gandhi Medical College and Hospital cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Indira Gandhi Medical College and Hospital NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 11255 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Indira Gandhi Medical College and Hospital MBBS cutoff 2025 was 11255 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 15819 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Indira Gandhi Medical College and Hospital accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

reviews.review_heading: Great College. Great Legacy. Great Location and Lots of Clinical Exposure. Lacks in Campus.
reviews.review_text: Since Shimla is a hill area, there is a shortage of land for an adequate campus. Our campus is good. Wi-Fi is only available in the library. Classrooms are good with modern facilities. There is a shortage of 2 lecture theatres. Single rooms for boys. Only 23 students will get rooms in the first year. The rest of the students will get hostels in the 2nd year. Girls' hostel has double occupancy rooms, and they get single rooms in the final year. Mess food is good in the boys' hostel but bad in the...

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with great medical exposure and very helpful beforehand experience.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and infrastructure in igmc are quite typical. Sports like volleyball, football and table tennis are available in the hostel. Mess facilities are also good. There is no canteen in the hostel. There are single bedrooms for each individual in the boys hostel whereas girls have double bedrooms as they live in sharing.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with a beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are great. The infrastructure is good. Hostel facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, with good doctors and facilities.
reviews.review_text: A library is available. A reading room is available 24 hours. The classrooms are big enough and have smart screens. There is a badminton court inside and an auditorium for functions. Every year, different functions are organised, and classes are taken by teachers regularly.

reviews.review_heading: It has amazing college life and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college and hospital are situated 2-3 km away from the boys and girls hostel. The college contains 5 lecture theatres, an auditorium, a cafeteria, a library cum reading room, a badminton court, dissection hall, pathology lab, pharmacology lab, physiology lab, biochemistry lab, microbiology lab and forensic lab. The hospital contains various departments of their respective specialties.

reviews.review_heading: It has been a pleasure being a part of IGMC. I would recommend it to all medical aspirants.
reviews.review_text: The lecture halls are good, college, as well as hospital, has Wi-Fi, Library is well stocked with various medical books and journals, but the seating area is less. All the departments have adequate labs and other facilities. The hostel is a little far from the college and hospital and doesn't have any facility other than rooms and mess. The quality of mesa food is below par.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college in terms of faculty, infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi facility available in college and hostel. There are spacious classrooms and equipped with the latest projector and screens. There is a central library, and also there is e-library which has computers with LAN facility. The hostel provides good and hygienic food. There are medical facilities in the hostel. The college also encourages sports. There is also a basketball court in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and placements are great, but the infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in the college library as well as the boys hostel. A basketball court and a badminton court are also available here. There are 5 lecture theatres. Almost 3 lecture theatres are great, but the rest of the two lecture theatres are not that good. Each department has its own labs. There are single occupancy rooms available in the hostel, and they are great. All the hostel rooms are well furnished. Quality of food served in the cafeteria is great, and that canteen runs und...

reviews.review_heading: College is absolutely fantastic and very beautiful, as it is surrounded by mountains.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the campus is good. It is situated in Shimla and the college is scenic. You can witness snow here. The college has its own library, gym, and basketball court, and they are good. Classrooms are hygienic and have Wi-Fi. Modern labs are available here. The hostel has a mess, and it is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: IGMC is the best college you can get after NEET in H. P.
reviews.review_text: It has been a great experience being a part of igmc. To be honest this college is very spacious for the students, the hostels are very good, although you can imagine a regular mess food in hostels, it has a library with a large amount of relevant books but this space in library is very less for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty and interesting classes.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is very good from teaching staff to working and helping everyone is true to their work. The labs too are fully equipped. Badminton courts nice mess with good food library everything is available and of good quality going on tours for sports is also a thing here.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied because of teaching, ambience and very good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but only limited students can get it. Classrooms are good and spacious, and the labs are also good. Food in the canteen is good. For boys, single rooms are available, but for girls, rooms are on sharing. About 2-4 girls are allotted in a room. The campus is not that big.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our faculty members, but I am not satisfied with the management.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements for our course. The salary packages are not offered to students. Companies won't visit our college to recruit students. Our course has been started in 2017, and the first batch is running late, so no internships are offered to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is impressive. If you like a large area and natural places with mountain-view classrooms, this is the best college from the infrastructure point of view. Labs are fully functional. The hostel is not good. I would never suggest choosing a hostel from this college. Canteen is very basic. You will have very few options to have something good to eat. The food served in the hostel is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dev Bhoomi Medical College of Ayurveda and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in the first year, so these are the details I can provide you with as of now. Each batch consists of 60 students. Placement isn't a thing, it's a private college, so half of the internship is done here and the other half can be done in any hospital that student have to look for themself. For internship and after graduation, the hospital is mostly empty with few cases of just common seasonal visitors for practice, one must consider another hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: I won't recommend the hostel for sure, there are too many restrictions. Calling parents every Sunday for an outing is a headache for sure. Not at all recommended. Food is bearable. The canteen doesn't have many options, and you'll get fed up in just a few months. The library only opens during class time; after class, it's of no use. Although the library does have many books.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria at Charotar University of Science & Technology apart from national-level entrance exams?

faqs.answer: A:    If the student appeared in JEE exam, then there is no need to give entrance exam of Charotar University. If not appeared in JEE then they have to give entrance exam ie GUJCET. Students must be passed with aggregate 50% in PCM. For admission in Charotar, the process is online mode . In entrance exam 60% obtained in theory subjects such as Physics, Chemistry and Maths . 40% weight age of percentile of GUJCET entrance exam.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of CHARUSAT?
overview_faqs.answer: In CHARUSAT, Application, prospectus and registration fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done except some situation. Further, the university refund caution fee deposit. Additionally, convenience fee & taxes charged would not be refunded/ reversed for any refund or reversal of any transaction. Given below is the case in which university offers refunds:If transaction is successfull, and candidates didn't get the event ticket, then candidates should contact the university as possible through email on alumni@charusat.ac.inFor events: If event is cancelled by the organizers, then CHARUSAT will not be responsible for any circumstances arised like refunding ticket amount. However, you can directly contact organizers which you can find on event detail page.For Membership: If any discrepancy is found in your details, your life membership would be cancelled without any refund.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experience at CSPIT has been very positive with supportive faculty and modern facilities.

content.Placements: I am from the computer engineering batch of Sandhu by S Patel Institute of Technology. In our course, around 75 percent of students are placed through campus drive. The highest package offered is about developed, and the package is around 3 LPA. The average package is around 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our computer engineering department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a central library with vast resources. Hostel provides good facilities with planned rooms. It has 24X7 medical support, and some nice food. There are also four grounds and indoor game facilities that ensure overall students' development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strong placements, supportive faculty members, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: I was part of the computer engineering batch of 2024-2025. Around 85-90% of students are placed. The highest package is 15 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and average is 6 LPA to 7 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and Capgemini. About 70% of students got internships at Deloitte, Cognizant, and HCL with roles like software engineer, developer, and analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The department has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a digital library. Hostels are clean and comfortable. Food in the mess/canteen is hygienic, and medical support is available on campus. Students also enjoy sports grounds, indoor games, and a gym for recreation.

admission_overview.college_name: CHARUSAT University Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Process, Fee, Selections

paragraphs: Charotar University of Science and Technology admissionis currently underway for online courses. The university gives a wide range of programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These courses are provided in many fields, such as Science, Technology, Computer Application, Pharmacy, and more. Students seekingCHARUSATadmission must fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria of the desired course. The admission process at university is conducted in both online and offline modes. The university accept students mostly on entrance basis.students can read to know more about courses, eligibility, selection criteria, fees and admission procedure of university.

AtCharotar University of Science and Technology, students can pursue over 80 programmes across different specialisations. Additionally, students can also enrol in online programmes offered by the university. The university offers courses through its associated colleges. To apply for course students need to visit the official website of the university. Students can refer to table below to know aboutCHARUSAT admission 2024 highlights:
CHARUSAT Admission 2024 Highlights
Mode of study
Full time/ Regular mode/ Online
Programmes offered
Admission Status 2024
How to apply
UG courses: INR 1.5 lakh to INR 6.4 lakh
PG courses: INR 90,000 to INR 4.8 lakh
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma
Popular programmes
BSc| BTech| MSc| MTech

Charotar University of Science and Technology course admissionis based on entrance exams for most of its courses. Students must fulfil the admission criteria before applying for the desired programme. The university accepts many national and state level exams, such as JEE Main, GUJCET, NEET, etc for shortlisting students. Additionally, the student's marks in the last qualifying exams are also taken into consideration. students can refer to table mentioned below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularCHARUSAT courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Charotar University of Science and Technology feeis inclusive of various components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, library fees, and more. Some fee components are charged only once, while the remaining need to be paid either yearly or semester wise. Students need to pay the fee to finalise their seats at the university. CHARUSAT fee differs as per course and specialisation selected by students. The fee ranges betweenINR 50,000andINR 6.4 lakh. Students can refer to the following table for coursetowiseCHARUSAT feesand the average package:
Note: This information is sourced from an official source and is subject to change.

Charotar University of Science and Technology seat intakedepends on as per course and specialisation chosen by students. To get a seat students need to fulfil the admission criteria and pay course fee. For some courses, the university assigns a certain amount of seats throughACPC counselling. students can refer to table mentioned below to know aboutCHARUSAT seat intakefor popular programmes:
Note: This information is sourced from an official source and is subject to change.

Charotar University of Science and Technology admissionis a multitostep procedure that involves application, selection, counselling and final admission confirmation. Students applying for the various programmes offered at the institute must fulfil coursetospecific eligibility criteria before applying for the programme. The admission process of the university is conducted through both offline and online modes. Students can follow the steptowiseCHARUSAT admission processgiven below:
lists: Students can visit the official website of the university and register themselves. Registered students need to fill in the application form by providing details, such as name, email ID, phone number, desired course and more. To submit the form students need to pay the application fee.

Students will be selected based on course specific eligibility criteria decided by the university. The university allows students on both merit and an entrance basis depending on course. For programmes, such as BTech, BPharma, MTech, etc, the university accepts national or statetolevel entrance exams (NEET, GUJCET, CMAT). selected students will be called in for counselling.
To confirm their admission, students need to pay the admission fee and go through document verification.

faqs.question: Are pursuing UG courses at Charotar University of Science & Technology expensive?
faqs.answer: If you want to pursue UG degree from Chaotar University of Science and technology, the fees is not too high as comparitively to other private universities. The average tuition fees for UG courses at CHARUSAT is around 3,00,000 per year. However, the fees vary depending on the course. For example, the fees for engineering courses are higher than the fees for Science courses. However charotar University also offer some scholarship and financial scholarships. And if you will avoid the extra expenses so you can definitely afford it.

college_info.college_name: CHARUSAT University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: If you want to pursue UG degree from Chaotar University of Science and technology, the fees is not too high as comparitively to other private universities.

The average tuition fees for UG courses at CHARUSAT is around 3,00,000 per year. However, the fees vary depending on the course. For example, the fees for engineering courses are higher than the fees for Science courses.
However charotar University also offer some scholarship and financial scholarships. And if you will avoid the extra expenses so you can definitely afford it.

CHARUSAT fee is a sum of multiple components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Candidates are required to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Below is CHARUSAT courses and fee:
Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

CHARUSAT BBA students can benefit from various kinds of scholarships, including the CHARUSAT Merit Scholarship, Late Maniben Shankarbhai Patel Scholarship, Late Shankarbhai Chhaganbhai Patel Scholarship, Late Dahiben Ravjibhai Patel & Dineshbhai Ravjibhai Patel Merit Cum Means Scholarship, Prof. S. G. Shah Scholarship, Urmil & Mayuri Desai Family Trust Scholarship, Umedbhai Dharamdas Patel Charitable Trust Scholarship, and CSPIT-Alumni Association Scholarship. These scholarships are offered to Indian as well as foreign students who meet the eligibility criteria set by the university or the relevant scholarship authority.

CHARUSAT MBA students are eligible for different types of scholarships, such as the CHARUSAT Merit Scholarship, Late Maniben Shankarbhai Patel Scholarship, Late Shankarbhai Chhaganbhai Patel Scholarship, Late Dahiben Ravjibhai Patel & Dineshbhai Ravjibhai Patel Merit Cum Means Scholarship, Prof. S. G. Shah Scholarship, Urmil & Mayuri Desai Family Trust Scholarship, Umedbhai Dharamdas Patel Charitable Trust Scholarship, and CSPIT-Alumni Association Scholarship. These scholarships are available to Indian students, along with international students satisfying the eligibility norms laid down by the university or the concerned scholarship authority.

Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University popular programmes are BTech, BSc and MBA. The university offers BTech courses for duration of 4 years. The BSc courses offered in Agriculture, Forestry, Forensic Science, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Zoology, Food Technology, and others. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.

review_content.Placements: The bulk of hiring comes from mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. If you have decent grades (no backlogs) and basic coding skills, you will likely get placed in one of these. The college does not hand hold you for internships. You have to be proactive and find them yourself, though they might help with the paperwork.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% students got placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 70% got internships. Roles offered are Software Engineer, Analyst, and Developer, good for the students who have come.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

review_summary.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.

content.Placements: There are 90% of students who were placed in the B.Tech course this year. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA in top companies like Swaraj, Mahindra, and Robbins.
content.Infrastructure: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: I will complete B.Tech in Computer Science (2025-2029). Around 75-80% students are placed. The highest package is about 20 LPA, the lowest 3 LPA, and the average is 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 60% got internships as developers or analysts.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.

content.Placements: The bulk of hiring comes from mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. If you have decent grades (no backlogs) and basic coding skills, you will likely get placed in one of these. The college does not hand hold you for internships. You have to be proactive and find them yourself, though they might help with the paperwork.
content.Infrastructure: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.

content.Placements: Around 85% students got placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 70% got internships. Roles offered are Software Engineer, Analyst, and Developer, good for the students who have come.
content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: More focus on social media and digital marketing.

content.Placements: The CEO of my college is around 30 to 40% per year, depending on their strength and the skills they have gained during the academic sessions. With the help of psychology and extracurricular activities, they have secured placements in very reputable companies.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the infrastructure is very well-furnished, and their main focus is on theoretical knowledge, similar to what we experience in regular schools. There is a lack of sports infrastructure, which is something a student should have to relieve mental stress during their studying period.

admission_overview.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Selection and Application form

admission_process.title: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission 2025is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates near the University can visit the campus and purchase the application form from the admission office. Aspirants willing to apply online must visit the University's official website. Admissions to the programmes offered atDBUUare done on a merit basis for all courses. The university shortlists the candidates based on their merit in the qualifying exam. Students seeking to get admission to the courses offered at the university can refer to the following article to learn the detailedadmission procedure for Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University.

TheDBUU admission criteriaare merit-based for most of its courses. Candidates willing to take admission can apply online or offline. Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University offers more than thirty undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and diploma courses. The university accepts students for its BAMS programme based on NEET scores. The courses are offered via its ten constituent schools in different streams such as Nursing,Engineeringand Technology, Arts,Commerce, etc. Interested candidates can check out the table below for topDBBU courses:

TheDev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission processis a multi-step process that begins with the release of the application forms and ends with the submission of admission confirmation fees by the selected candidates. The step-wiseDBUU admission processis given below:
Step 1: DBUU Application Process 2025
The application process is conducted in online and offline modes. Interested candidates can apply for admission either by visiting the official website of the university or the college campus.
Step 2: Shortlisting of candidates
The candidates are shortlisted based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Result declaration and Admission Confirmation
The University releases a merit list on the official website. Selected candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fees to book their seats.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MSc in Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University?
faqs.answer: Students looking to enrol in the MSc programme offered at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University need to fulfil the eligibility criteria as specified by the university. The university offers several MSc courses, admission to which is merit-based. faqs.question: Can I take lateral entry admission to BPharm at DBUU?
faqs.answer: Yes, DBUU provides lateral entry admission directly to the second year of the BPharm programme. The total duration of such course is 3 years. Before applying for DBUU BPharm (Lateral Entry) admission, aspirants must ensure that they fulfil the basic eligibility requirements set by the university. They must have passed a two-year Diploma In Pharmacy (DPharm) from a recognised board with at least 50% (45% in case of SC/ST category) to be eligible for lateral entry admission.

faqs.question: Can I join Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions directly?
faqs.answer: YES,You can directly take admission to Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions (DBGI). The Applicant can walk directly into the campus & meet the admission counselor, who will counsel the student regarding the different courses and the eligibility criteria.The candidate must have passed the 10+2 examination or equivalent with a minimum of 45% marks in Total and also have Mathematics as a subject in the qualifying examination then it was eligible to be admission.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University?
faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University offers more than 30 courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, Diploma and doctoral levels. The courses are offered in multiple streams such as Nursing, Management, Engineering, Design, Science, etc. DBUU offers these courses via its ten constituent schools.Candidates can refer to the table below for DBUU school and courses offered under them:SchoolCourses OfferedSchool of Engineering and ComputingBTech, BCA, BSc, MTech, MCA and PhDSchool of Management and CommerceBBA, BCom, MBA, PhDSchool of Pharmacy and ResearchDiploma, BPharm, MPharm, PharmD, PhDSchool of Hotel ManagementDiploma, BHM, BBA, MHM, PhDSchool of Allied SciencesBSc, MSc, PhDSchool of AgricultureBSc, BTech, MScSchool of Architecture, Planning and DesignDiploma, BArch, BPlan, BDes, BSc, MPlanDev Bhoomi Medical College of Paramedical SciencesBMLT, BPT, BMRIT, BSc, BHA, MHA, MPHSchool of Journalism and Liberal ArtsBDes, BSc, BA, BFA, MA, PhDSchool of NursingGNM, BSc

faqs.question: Are admission open at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University?
faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission 2026 open. The university accepts admission through online application. Students can appear directly through the official website. The admission is based on merit and meet the eligibility criteria.

paragraphs: Dev Bhoomi Uttrakhand University placement cell also known as the Corporate Resource Centre plays an important role in placing students fromm all courses. So far, more than 15,500 offers have been provided to students over the years. The placement rate achieved during DBUU placements 2025 was 80%. The highest and average package recorded during the placements was INR 43 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Companies like Jaro Education, TCS, Intellipaat, Zscaler and many more were part of the placement season.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in MBA at Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: For Master of Business Administration, the Human Resourses/ International Buisness/Marketing and Finance are best courses in Dev Bhoomi Group Of Institution. However, Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions offers MBA courses in various specializations such as HR, International Business, Marketing, Finance, Agri Business, Business Analytics, Family Business & Entrepreneurship. The School of Management and Commerce at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University provides a diverse range of courses which include B.Com, BBA, and MBA highly dedicated to reshaping students into trained professionals who can serve the vital verticals of the Management system.

faqs.question: What is the DBUU fees for BPharm and BPharm (Lateral Entry)?
faqs.answer: DBUU offers BPharm and BPharm (Lateral Entry) courses. The fee structure for both courses is the same. The following table presents the total DBUU BPharm fees for regular and later entry admissions: Fee Components BPharm (4-year) BPharm (LE) (3-year) Academic Fee (Tuition Fee) INR 6 Lakh INR 4.5 Lakh Exam Fee INR 36,000 INR 27,000 Note: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. Besides the above mentioned fee (academic fee + exam fee), candidates are required to submit one-time fees of INR 10,000 at admision.

faqs.question: What is total fee for DBUU BCom course?
faqs.answer: DBUU offers BCom and BCom (Hons) courses. The fee structure for both courses is the same. The following table presents the total DBUU BCom fees : Fee Components BCom (Hons) (4-year) BCom (3-year) Academic Fee (Tuition Fee) INR 2.8 Lakh INR 2.1 Lakh Exam Fee INR 36,000 INR 27,000 Note: The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. Besides the above mentioned fee (academic fee + exam fee), candidates are required to submit one-time fees of INR 10,000 at admision.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.
reviews.review_text: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.
reviews.review_text: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

reviews.review_heading: More focus on social media and digital marketing.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the infrastructure is very well-furnished, and their main focus is on theoretical knowledge, similar to what we experience in regular schools. There is a lack of sports infrastructure, which is something a student should have to relieve mental stress during their studying period.

reviews.review_heading: College makes more interest in events and several activities. The teaching quality is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works average many times. Labs are average. Classrooms are also good. The library is average. The facilities in the hostel are average. The food is average, and the canteen is open from 10 AM to 9 PM. The hostel provides medical support if there is a serious illness, and they also have ambulance service for students. There are many events for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is mainly for the HOD curriculum, and there is a lack of sports facilities. However, if you talk about studies, proper management and facilities for the students and their future, the college infrastructure is good for the students who mainly focus on academics. Nevertheless, it lacks in providing that benefit for students who focus on extracurricular activities like sports and other pursuits.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, decent campus life. Average placements.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure available for the course are decent. Wi-Fi is rather slow but okay. There is a library at the top. Classrooms contain projectors with whiteboards. Some contain smart boards. The quality of food available in the mess is not so good, but okay. There are vending machines in every hostel, so you don't have to go to the canteen. The canteen contains good quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All in all, DBUU can be a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Here we are provided with two tables, as the room is a 2-seater, and you can choose the number of seats you want. There are two beds, one almirah, and an attached room with a commode and basin. The cleaners come every day to clean the room, and on Sundays, the washrooms are cleaned. The hostel with a three-seater non-attached washrooms room is 80,000, and the 2-seater with attached washrooms is 110,000 with a 5,000 registration fee. I would suggest taking a PG or rented apartment; it will cost h...

reviews.review_heading: School-like college, uniform-wala college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working anywhere in the labs. The labs are good enough for students to train for themselves, and faculty train them for the industry. Hostel food is very hygienic, but the taste of the food is not that good. The food is only good and tasty at the time of admission.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in budget, a school like college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working properly on our campus, it's not connecting well. The labs are well maintained and very good, the classrooms are very good, the capacity of students is above 100, and the library is good enough for studying. The librarian is strict about noise. Hostel food is good, but not that hygienic. Safety concerns are always at the top for food.

reviews.review_heading: MBA experience that feels practical but self-driven.
reviews.review_text: The campus is green and good, which helps when MBA work becomes hard. Classrooms are suitable for presentations and group discussions. The internet works for normal use, but is inconsistent at times. The library is decent for reference and exam preparation. Hostel life is simple and disciplined. Rooms are clean, but facilities are basic. Mess food is average and repetitive, so most students don't expect much variety. Overall, the environment is functional rather than luxurious.

reviews.review_heading: The MBA course here is more about efforts than hype.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quiet and away from the city, which helps us to focus on our studies. MBA classrooms are comfortable and suitable for presentations and group discussions. The internet is available but not always reliable for heavy work. The library is useful mainly during exams and project submissions. Hostels are basic but livable, with regular cleaning. Mess food is simple and repetitive, so many students prefer canteen food or outside options occasionally.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Architecture and Design, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who are seeking a design course.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean. Hostel rooms are good with Wi-Fi, though there is no Wi-Fi in classrooms. Clean food is provided in the mess and canteens. Vending machines are available for late-night cravings. There is a 24/7 water and electricity supply for uninterrupted study sessions. Laundry facilities are available, and washing machines are also provided in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best emerging university in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work properly. Classrooms are like a school. The library is very brilliant in our college. In the hostel, electricity is not constant. The mess food is not hygienic, and it is average. It has average medical facilities. Doctors are also not available on time, and a doctor is not that well-qualified.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for SNDT College?

faqs.answer: A:    The total number of MBA seats available at SNDT College is 200. Seats will be allotted on a first-come, first-serve basis, so better apply as soon as possible. Students must possess a bachelor's degree in any field from a recognised university with at least 50% of his/her total marks. Students must have a valid score in any of the National level entrance exams, such as CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, or the own entrance exam of the university. This is the combined intake for all the MBA specialisations offered by SNDT College. The number of students admitted in each specialisation may vary.
faqs.question: How many students can do MBA at SNDT College?

faqs.answer: A:    You can get into SNDT College with a score of 70 in MH CET law. SNDT College has offered LLB, BA LLB, and BBA LLB courses at a cutoff score of 80.36, 91.46, and 54.64, respectively, for the General AI category candidates. Considering SNDT College MHTCET law cutoff 2024, we can say that candidates can avail the LLB course at a score of 70. However, at this score, they cannot opt for BA LLB and BBA LLB course as the cutoff score is more than the given score. faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for SNDT College?

faqs.answer: To get admission to SNDT College, candidates must first check the eligibility criteria of programme they want to pursue. As per the college's admission guidelines admission to most of the programme is based on the national-level entrance exam. Therefore, candidates must qualify for the course-wise entrance exam. Candidates can follow the below-mentioned admission process steps of SNDT College:Step 1: New Horizon Application ProcessThe New Horizon application process is completely online. The application form is a key part of the admission process. Applications with incomplete or false information will not be entertained. Candidates can access the application form through the New Horizon College official website.Step 2: New Horizon Shortlisting of studentsCandidates' application forms are scrutinized for selection. For the UG programme, candidates' performance in the qualifying exam is considered and for the PG programme score of national or state-level entrance exams like KCET, GATE, PGCET, KMAT, etc., are accepted. Candidates are shortlisted based on the above-mentioned criteria.Step 3: New Horizon admission confirmationOnce the candidates are selected, they must confirm the seats by paying the admission fees. Candidates are required to submit the application form along with the documents specified in the application form.

admission_overview.college_name: SNDT Mumbai Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fees, Dates, Application

paragraphs: Shreemati Nathibai Damodar Thackersey Women’s University,also known as SNDT University, admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The college acceptsMAH CET, XAT, JEE Main, etc,for admission to the UG and PG courses. The University has three campuses, one each inChurchgate, Santacruz, and Pune. The Juhu campus has more than 15 professional and technical institutions with eight adjoining buildings. The campus offers various PG and PG diploma programmes in different fields such as Engineering, Management, Arts, Education, Technology, Communication, and many more. These courses are offered under 19 different departments, namely the Department of Computer Science, Department of Education Management, Department of Technology, and more.

SNDT Women's University admission is entrance-based to most of its UG and PG courses. Candidates have to meet the basic eligibility requirements of the respective courses to apply for the desired programme. Check below the eligibility criteria, accepting entrance exams, and more for the SNDT College course admissions:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SNDT University's fee structuremay include components such as Registration Fee, Tuition Fees, Development Fees, Alumni Fee, etc. Further,SNDT seat allocationis done through the counselling bodies of the respective courses. Check out the SNDT fees and seats for popular UG & PG courses:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

For admission to SNDT University, candidates must complete the entire admission process as per the college's admission guidelines. The process is mainly conducted online, hence, students must apply online at the official website of the university. Before applying for the desired programme, students must fulfil the admission criteria for the same. Find below the step-wise SNDT University admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Candidates must fill out the online application form by visiting the SNDT's official website (sndt.ac.in / https://sndt.digitaluniversity.ac). Once the application form is complete, candidates must take a print-out of the online form, attach Xerox copies of final year mark sheets of the qualifying exam of the applied course, and submit them to the Department Office.
Step 2: SNDT Shortlisting

The application forms are scrutinised based on the eligibility criteria of the course. Once found eligible, the Department will send a Google form link to the registered, eligible candidates via mail to the email addresses provided by the applicant. The candidate must fill out the form as accurately as possible; in case of errors, the application will not be processed further.

Step 3: Merit List and Document Verification:Once the merit list is published, selected candidates will receive notification via phone and email. They will be required to appear in person for document verification. Bring the online application form, original marksheets, and certificates for verification.
Step 4: SNDT Merit list/Final selection

The college releases a merit list of selected candidates. The candidates will be informed the same telephonically as well as via email wherein they will be called offline for document verification along with their online application form and original marksheets & certificates. After document verification, the candidates will proceed to pay the fees with the admin clerk

courses_data.name: SNDT Mumbai MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: SNDT College offers two year MBA programme at PG level. MBA is offered under multiple specialisations, including Human resources, Human Resource Management,Finance Management,Marketing Management, etc. The institute conducts an entrance test for the selection of candidates. It also considers the score of MH CET and national-level aptitude tests conducted during the current academic year. Find below details related to MBA at SNDT College:

faqs.question: Is CAT required for Executive MBA Admission at SNDT College?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common Admission Test required for Executive Master of Business Administration Admission at SNDT College. However, SNDT College also accepts the score of national level aptitude tests such as Management Aptitude Test  (MAT)/MAH-MBA-CET or any other equivalent exam for Master of Business Administration admission. Also, SNDT women's university conduct their entrence exam and SNDT university admission is both merit and entrence based.

faqs.question: What is the cut off of SNDT College?
faqs.answer: SNDT College MHCET Law cutoff 2024 was concluded for admission to BBA LLB and LLB courses. The cutoff was released for different categories belonging to the All India quota. Among the General All India quota, the cutoff score for BBA LLB was closed at80.36, and for LLB, it was closed at54.64. For more information on cutoff related information for SNDT College,click here.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to SNDT College?
faqs.answer: To get admission to SNDT College, candidates must first check the eligibility criteria of programme they want to pursue. As per the college's admission guidelines admission to most of the programme is based on the national-level entrance exam. Therefore, candidates must qualify for the course-wise entrance exam. Candidates can follow the below-mentioned admission process steps of SNDT College:Step 1: New Horizon Application ProcessThe New Horizon application process is completely online. The application form is a key part of the admission process. Applications with incomplete or false information will not be entertained. Candidates can access the application form through the New Horizon College official website.Step 2: New Horizon Shortlisting of studentsCandidates' application forms are scrutinized for selection. For the UG programme, candidates' performance in the qualifying exam is considered and for the PG programme score of national or state-level entrance exams like KCET, GATE, P

faqs.question: How many students can do MBA at SNDT College?
faqs.answer: The total number of MBA seats available at SNDT College is 200. Seats will be allotted on a first-come, first-serve basis, so better apply as soon as possible. Students must possess a bachelor's degree in any field from a recognised university with at least 50% of his/her total marks. Students must have a valid score in any of the National level entrance exams, such as CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, or the own entrance exam of the university. This is the combined intake for all the MBA specialisations offered by SNDT College. The number of students admitted in each specialisation may vary.

faqs.question: Does SNDT College accept any entrance exam for MBA admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, SNDT College accepts entrance exams for Master of Business Administration admission. SNDT College considers the score of national level aptitude tests such as SNAP/CAT/GMAT/XAT or any other equivalent exam for Master of Business Administration admission. The final selection for admission to the Master of Business Administration programme at SNDT College is based on the candidate's performance in the entrance exam, followed by group discussion and personal interview. The final selection is based on the candidate's overall performance in all these rounds.

faqs.question: Does SNDT Women's University provide placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has a placement cell. The official placement report has not been released. However, the NIRF report 2024 is out, incorporating the 2023 placement statistics. As per report, 413 PG (2-year) and 181 UG (4-year) students were placed during the 2023 drive. Check the complete insights of SNDT Women’s University placements 2023 for popular courses from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (PG-2 year) 1,083 Students placed (PG-2 year) 413 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 5 LPA Total students (UG-4 year) 240 Students placed (UG-4 year) 181 Median package (UG-4 year) INR 4.50 LPA NOTE: The above details are gathered from the NIRF report 2024.

highlights.description: SNDT College is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #478 by the QS World University Rankings 2026 under the category Southern Asia, and #1501+ under Asia. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the SNDT College rankings.

qs_world.description:
According to the rankings from QS World University Rankings, SNDT College outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Smt. Maniben M.P. Shah Women's College of Arts and CommerceReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best college with trusted.
reviews.review_text: There are many courses in the college. College has many circular activities for the students. There are game facilities for indoor and outdoor games like badminton, chess, carrom, cricket and etc. The library is also very big and offers lots of books and in the library there are computers to find information or for presentations.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Usha Mittal Institute of Technology ,MumbaiReviewed on 24 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Usha Mittal Institute Of Technology (SNDT Women's University).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is good. It's newly renovated. They have a hostel too. It's four sharing and two sharing occupancies. The mess food is average. College has a gym too. They have a basketball court but not many facilities for other sports. You can play badminton in the foyer.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Vanita Vishram Women’s UniversityReviewed on 24 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very helpful. My principal MS Abhilasha Agarwal is also very supportive.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were big. There was a good vibe in the library too. I did not stay in the hostel so I cannot tell you about it, but some of my friends stayed there, it is very safe. The canteen area was also big. The food was also good. We did a lot of activities on the college campus. I remember the blood donation camps exactly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Usha Mittal Institute of Technology ,MumbaiReviewed on 26 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Where you will find the three teachers you wanted.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi for three students. But 40 percent of the college is under renovation right now. The classrooms are clean and sufficient for the students. The canteen serves tasty food at affordable prices. Sports and extracurricular activities are also supported. The library is quite small for such a big college, but it's clean and has all the resources required.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Usha Mittal Institute of Technology ,MumbaiReviewed on 20 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great college, decent feel, easy life, and good placements.

The college has its own sports council, and activities are encouraged here, so no need to worry about that.
