reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure. Classrooms are clean, well-lit, and equipped with projectors. There is Wi-Fi available on campus, and the library is one of the best parts, stocked with good reference books and a peaceful reading space. Labs are simple but sufficient for a psychology practical. Hostel facilities are not available. Canteen food is average but affordable, and the canteen offers a variety of snacks at reasonable prices. The college also provides medical assistance, has a dece...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Usha Mittal Institute of Technology ,MumbaiReviewed on 20 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for girls with placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides Wi-Fi, and the mess facility has a curfew to ensure girls are safe. The infrastructure is also good, and the hostel building is being renovated, so we can expect more facilities. Each lab has its own Wi-Fi with around 20 PCs per lab. The library service is also provided, with two libraries, one for college students and another, the campus university library, which is big and accessible to everyone on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Smt. Maniben M.P. Shah Women's College of Arts and CommerceReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, strong academics & safe environment, but needs more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: My college offers well-maintained classrooms with smart boards, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and a good library with a wide collection of commerce and management books, journals, and e-resources. The computer lab is well-equipped and accessible for research and project work related to the B.Com course. The college also has basic medical facilities and regular doctor visits. Sports facilities include indoor games and access to grounds for volleyball, basketball, and other physical activities. The over...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Maniben Nanavati Women'S CollegeReviewed on 29 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has a good placement cell, great infrastructure, and facilities. I am satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, smartboards, and a library with updated books. We have vegetarian options in our canteen as well. It is a non-muslim institution, so we are not accessible to non-vegetarian canteen food, but we can carry our own tiffin. We also have a ground for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Smt. B. M. Ruia Girls CollegeReviewed on 14 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: No permanent faculty for BCA and no proper campus.
reviews.review_text: This college does not have its building, the college teaches the students in a building where the first two floors are residential.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vanita Vishram Women’s UniversityReviewed on 13 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and best mentors .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in college, and also the best teachers and the very best mentors. The quality of food in the canteen was the best, and for the 3 years I spent in that college, I used to have the best food in the canteen, which was freaking hygienic and super tasty and also available at reasonable rates.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Shahid Shikshan Prasarak Mandals Shahid Virpatni Laxmi MahavidyalayaReviewed on 21 Jun 2025)

reviews.review_text: At my college, there were different classrooms for different departments. For my course, we were taught in digital classrooms and computer labs. For traveling, bus facilities were available for different areas. In the canteen, various types of food were available. Our college hostel was very comfortable and had a Wi-Fi area.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vanita Vishram Women’s UniversityReviewed on 21 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great college with affordable pricing.
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities. They have two libraries with a lot of books for different backgrounds. There are clean rooms and a good environment with a female warden in the girls hostel. Full protection and safety are provided. Sports Day is also conducted every year with different sports games like chess, badminton, long jump, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Shreemati Jamnabai H. Wadhwa College of Technology and Kothari College of Management StudiesReviewed on 4 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good and the college is so clean.
reviews.review_text: The percentage of students who get placed is 90%. The highest salary is Rs. 25,000 per month and the average salary is Rs. 15,000 per month. The lowest salary is Rs. 12,000 per month for the job. The top recruiting companies for our course are ICICI Bank, Educative, and SBI Securities. It offers roles like sales, HR, and customer service.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SMRK BK AK Mahila MahavidyalayaReviewed on 2 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and helpful teachers but placements could be better.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-maintained and spacious. Labs are also provided to the students depending on the courses like science as computer-based. Wi-Fi is available for the departments. Library also has a good and decent collection of books, journals, and some reference books too.

highlights.summary:

Dibrugarh University admissions 2025 are open. few more updates are given below:

table.particular: No. of Affiliated Institutes and Colleges

college_info.intro:
Dibrugarh University has various faculty of studies including the Faculty of Commerce & Management Studies, the Faculty of Science & Engineering and the Faculty of Education. Dibrugarh University courses are offered at UG, PG, and PhD levels across various specialisations, such as Philosophy, Sociology, Law, Journalism and Management studies.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular courses at the University. Dibrugarh University Engineering stream is offered through the BTech programme in several specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Petroleum Engineering. The BTech programme offered at the University typically spans 8 semesters.
Dibrugarh University Assam is also known for offering an MBA programme in both part-time and full-time modes. The full-time MBA programme offers dual specialisation options to students in areas such as Marketing, Finance, HRM, Event Management etc.
Check out more details in the below video:
For more Dibrugarh University popular programme details, check out the table given below:

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Jorhat Kendriya Mahavidyalaya.

review_content.Placements: Best college I have studied since 2021 higher secondary, and I can say that the college is awesome and also get A grade on NAAC. Students get an internship through the college in their respective courses. They go to an area given by their teacher, and in that they collect a certificate.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and many more. The hostel in campus only, and they get everything in the college including canteen, rest room, gym, and more to play for mind relaxation. We have medical facilities nearby. Everything is next door.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty, value for the money, and everything.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students opt for a Masters and further Ph.D. in their respective fields. We have a Masters in Life Science here. A lot of the students choose teaching careers by taking the exams and all. Few go for other careers, like research, and others. You do not get direct placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing with lots of benches and a natural pond in the centre. The building is very close to nature, and the departments and classrooms are airy and good. We have an auditorium and a seminar hall for meetings and stuff. Hostel life is good too, but it's too strict, but you can always choose PG.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Petroleum Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

review_content.Placements: 55% students placed. The highest package is 22 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average is 10 to 12 LPA. Oil and Natural Gas Corporation, Indian Oil Corporation Limited, and Numaligarh Refinery Limited recruited. Roles offered are Drilling engineer, Production engineer, and Reservoir engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: On campus hostel accommodation for both boys & girls, with wardens and support staff. The common university library is accessible, it serves students, faculty and research scholars. It includes course books, reference materials, journals, etc. Several canteens & one cafeteria. A hygienic, modern double-storied cafeteria is located within the institute campus. Also, university-level canteens are shared. Food for students and staff. Wi-Fi & LAN connectivity are available. Well-furnished classrooms with teaching aids, projectors, etc. Some smart classrooms are in recent buildings. Engineering workshop facilities are available.

course_faqs.question: Is BA available in Dibrugarh University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, BA is available at Dibrugarh University as a full time course. The duration of the course is three years. At the university campus, students can pursue BA in Performing Arts. BA in various other specialisations is offered through the colleges affiliated with the university. These specialisations include Sociology, English, Psychology, Geography, Political Science, etc. A candidate who has passed Class 12 from a recognised board can apply for admission to the BA courses offered at Dibrugarh

course_faqs.question: Is there any one-time fee included for BA admission at Dibrugarh University?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, a one-time fee is included in the components of Dibrugarh University BA fee. A one-time fee of INR 1,050 is payable at the time of admission. The other components include tuition fee, hostel fee, development fee, etc. The tuition fee for BA at the university is INR 21,000. The fee for various specialisations offered through affiliated colleges may vary. The mention fee is taken from the official website of the university. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

course_faqs.question: Is the BA application fee refundable at Dibrugarh University?
course_faqs.answer: The Dibrugarh University, application fee is a non-refundable payment. There is no provision for cancelling submitted application. However, if more than one payment is made for the same programme from the same user account, then extra amount may be refunded after verification. In such a case, the applicant must file a claim within ten days from the date of transaction through the email mentioned in the application portal. review_summary.college_name: Dibrugarh University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) in Political Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Dibrugarh University: Campus and facilities.

content.Placements: I won’t go by percentage, but only 60 students get selected for the university in the particular course which I’m pursuing. Everyone has the same package, there is no highest or lowest package. Everything is good in this university, so the students who wish to come here and explore can come to the university for their higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities here are the green campus, quiet environment, free Wi-Fi for hostelers, hostel facilities, bicycle facilities to roam the university campus, library, park, museums, labs, medical facilities and many more. So the students who wish to come here could come and enjoy the university facilities and their courses.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Dibrugarh University for engineering is good.

content.Placements: In mechanical branch the placement percentage is 70 to 80 percent. Most of the students get jobs in PSUs like OIL NRL Wipro Infosys TATA, JCB etc. The highest package is about 18LPA and the lowest is about 4 to 5LPA. Placement record is average here. OIL recurring is a lot in 2019.
content.Infrastructure: Library and labs are fine, not bad. Library is air conditioned. Classrooms are big and can accommodate 60 to 70 students. Hostels are average. Food there is also average. Medical facilities are also much better there. They do their work on time only.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Education - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jorhat Kendriya Mahavidyalaya.

content.Placements: Best college I have studied since 2021 higher secondary, and I can say that the college is awesome and also get A grade on NAAC. Students get an internship through the college in their respective courses. They go to an area given by their teacher, and in that they collect a certificate.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and many more. The hostel in campus only, and they get everything in the college including canteen, rest room, gym, and more to play for mind relaxation. We have medical facilities nearby. Everything is next door.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty, value for the money, and everything.

content.Placements: Most of the students opt for a Masters and further Ph.D. in their respective fields. We have a Masters in Life Science here. A lot of the students choose teaching careers by taking the exams and all. Few go for other careers, like research, and others. You do not get direct placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing with lots of benches and a natural pond in the centre. The building is very close to nature, and the departments and classrooms are airy and good. We have an auditorium and a seminar hall for meetings and stuff. Hostel life is good too, but it's too strict, but you can always choose PG.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Petroleum Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

content.Placements: 55% students placed. The highest package is 22 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average is 10 to 12 LPA. Oil and Natural Gas Corporation, Indian Oil Corporation Limited, and Numaligarh Refinery Limited recruited. Roles offered are Drilling engineer, Production engineer, and Reservoir engineer.
content.Infrastructure: On campus hostel accommodation for both boys & girls, with wardens and support staff. The common university library is accessible, it serves students, faculty and research scholars. It includes course books, reference materials, journals, etc. Several canteens & one cafeteria. A hygienic, modern double-storied cafeteria is located within the institute campus. Also, university-level canteens are shared. Food for students and staff. Wi-Fi & LAN connectivity are available. Well-furnished classrooms with teaching aids, projectors, etc. Some smart classrooms are in recent buildings. Engineering workshop facilities are available.

admission_overview.college_name: Dibrugarh University Course Admissions 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: Dibrugarh University offers admission on the basis ofmeritandentrance examscores. The university offers courses in streams like Commerce, Engineering, Social Science, etc. These courses are offered at the undergraduate, post graduate, and doctoral level. It has its own entrance exams likeDUPGET, DURAT, BED CET that are conducted for courses like MA, PhD, and BEd, respectively. Further, the Dibrugarh University accepts entrance exams likeCAT/MAT/CMATandGATE.

Dibrugarh University admissionto courses is either entrance-based or merit-based. The University offers a variety of UG, PG and doctoral-level programmes in the streams ofHumanities & Social Sciences,Science,Commerce,Engineering,Teaching & EducationandMedical & Health Sciences.Dibrugarh Universityoffers most of the UG courses via its affiliated colleges, where admission is merit-based. The university offers PG courses through more than 10 departments and centres of the university. Admission to these courses is done by the university's in-house entrance exams such asDUPGET,DURAT, B.ED CET for MA, PhD, and B.Ed, respectively.For courses such as MBA and MTech, the university accepts valid scores ofCAT/MAT/CMATandGATE, respectively.

Admission to allDibrugarh University courses(UG, PG, diploma and others) is both merit and entrance-based. Eligible candidates can register online by visiting the official website of the university and its affiliated colleges as per the opted courses. The following table mentions the eligibility, selection & fee for some of thepopular UG, PG and doctoral-level programmes:
Popular Courses
Eligibility &
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with 45% aggregate
UG or PG degree with 50% aggregate
Graduation with minimum 50% aggregate
Graduate with 50% aggregate
CAT/MAT/CMAT
Check out more details in the below video:

Dibrugarh University course feesinclude various components such as admission fees, caution deposits, tuition fees, etc. Some of these components, such as the security fee are one-time chargeable. Other components could be refundable, non-refundable, to be paid semester-wise or annually. Candidates seeking admission toDibrugarh University coursescan check out the below table forDU course feealong with the total seats.:
TheDibrugarh University seat intakementioned in the table above includes the seat intake in all affiliated colleges and course specialisations.
Note:The fees and seats mentioned above are taken from official sources/ sanctioning bodies and are subject to change.

Dibrugarh University admission processfor all courses is conductedonlineon its official website. Interested candidates must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and appear for the selection process, determined by the University. Eligible candidates have to begin their admission process by filling out the Dibrugarh University application form before the deadline. Aspirants canrefer to the below steps to complete the Dibrugarh University admission process:
Step 1: Dibrugarh University Application process
TheDU application formsare released online on the university's official website. Candidates must fill out the application form very carefully and pay the required application fee before the deadline.
Step 2: Dibrugarh University Selection Process

The admission criteria for DU courses are bothmerit-based and entrance-based. For admission to entrance-based courses, candidates need to appear for the relevant entrance exam. DU accepts various national-level entrance exam scores to shortlist candidates for final admission.
For admission to merit-based courses,Dibrugarh Univeristyshortlists candidates based on their scores in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Dibrugarh University Admission Confirmation

After all the selection rounds are over. DU releases a merit list on the official website. Shortlisted candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fee and appear for the document verification process to confirm their admission.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Dibrugarh University. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #53 rank in the Pharmacy category, and #30 under State Public University. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Dibrugarh University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 6th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Assam In 2025
2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Assam In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Dibrugarh University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Dibrugarh University fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Dibrugarh University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Dibrugarh University fell 10 ranks to #53 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
In the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with previous year's ranking. In 2025, Dibrugarh University fell 2 ranks to #30 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Dibrugarh University: Campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities here are the green campus, quiet environment, free Wi-Fi for hostelers, hostel facilities, bicycle facilities to roam the university campus, library, park, museums, labs, medical facilities and many more. So the students who wish to come here could come and enjoy the university facilities and their courses.

reviews.review_heading: Dibrugarh University for engineering is good.
reviews.review_text: Library and labs are fine, not bad. Library is air conditioned. Classrooms are big and can accommodate 60 to 70 students. Hostels are average. Food there is also average. Medical facilities are also much better there. They do their work on time only.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Jorhat Kendriya MahavidyalayaReviewed on 6 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Jorhat Kendriya Mahavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and many more. The hostel in campus only, and they get everything in the college including canteen, rest room, gym, and more to play for mind relaxation. We have medical facilities nearby. Everything is next door.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by D.C.B. Girls CollegeReviewed on 24 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, value for the money, and everything.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing with lots of benches and a natural pond in the centre. The building is very close to nature, and the departments and classrooms are airy and good. We have an auditorium and a seminar hall for meetings and stuff. Hostel life is good too, but it's too strict, but you can always choose PG.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: On campus hostel accommodation for both boys & girls, with wardens and support staff. The common university library is accessible, it serves students, faculty and research scholars. It includes course books, reference materials, journals, etc. Several canteens & one cafeteria. A hygienic, modern double-storied cafeteria is located within the institute campus. Also, university-level canteens are shared. Food for students and staff. Wi-Fi & LAN connectivity are available. Well-furnished classrooms...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department were very good. There are digital classrooms, a big library, labs, and also Wi-Fi connection available in our department as well as the college. The food is also good and hygienic. Don't know much about the hostel, but the canteen is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Sonari CollegeReviewed on 6 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I really like my college. It has good infrastructure facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for our course was quite good. Classrooms were well maintained with projectors air conditioning and comfortable seating. The college provided Wi-Fi computer labs and a central library with a wide range of books and digital resources. Hostel facilities were decent, with spacious rooms 24/7 WiFi laundry services, and common rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tinsukia CollegeReviewed on 31 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good. The college has digital classrooms as well. Hostel quality is also very good, including food and other facilities. Medical facilities are also provided. The canteen is good and clean. Wi-Fi works very well. The library is very big and good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dibru CollegeReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college environment, which has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good and among the best in our locality. We have smart classrooms and a neat and clean environment. Labs are well-maintained and in good condition. The college library has a large collection of books and notes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dibru CollegeReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am happy because of the teachers, but disappointed by the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Buildings are large, and the campus is big with department wise classrooms. The auditorium is old, and the chairs are comfortable. The library has a range of books. The canteen has a variety of food. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sonari CollegeReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: 1 quality education- 2 good facilities support.
reviews.review_text: Department has good infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms, a strong library collection (especially in political Science and international relations), computer facilities, and campus Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities were decent, with regular water and electricity supply. Mess food was average but hygienic, and the canteen offered affordable meals. Medical facilities were available on campus, and there were adequate opportunities for sports, cultural activities, and debates.

reviews.review_heading: Opt for B.Tech in ECE only if you are there to have a great college life.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure was better than most things there, since it was a university. There were various other departments. There was a new central library with three floors but the electronics lab facilities did not match the ones at IITs or tier 1 national colleges, not even close. Hostels seemed reasonable, and the college infrastructure was better than AEC, JEC, and other state government colleges. Giving you a good feel when you are still inside the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Assam Medical CollegeReviewed on 12 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading:
Good placements in 2024
Really good infrastructure clean and hygience area 
Facilities excellent .
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious with modern infrastructure. Classrooms are large, well-ventilated, and equipped with audio-visual aids. Laboratories are well-equipped for practical classes. Hostels are sizable, clean, and well-maintained with separate accommodation for boys and girls. The hostels come with 24-hour electricity, running water, and CCTV security. Mess food is considered average, with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options and a monthly cost of around Rs. 1,500- Rs. 2,000. The college ca...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by North Eastern Regional Institute of ManagementReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best law college in Guwahati.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were satisfactory. Wi-Fi was properly maintained. A huge collection of books was available in the library. Hostel quality was also good. Food was acceptable. Limited medical facility. Some sports were present, like badminton.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by D.H.S.K. Commerce CollegeReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, everything is good. Faculty members are often helpful. Infrastructure is now improving.
reviews.review_text: New labs are being constructed, and library is well-established and cleaned. Wi-Fi is there but students get no access to it. Hostels are okay, canteen is a bit too expensive and uses too much oil. Sports and games are well-established and organised.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Dr. S.N Medical College, Jodhpur:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, it is feasible to secure admission at S.N. Medical College, Jodhpur with 70 percentiles in class 12th. Based on NEET PG scores, the college offers the MD and MS specialisations. Eligible candidates must apply online and meet the specific eligibility criteria for their desired program. Check out the eligibility criteria for S.N. Medical College through NEET PG exam:Candidates who wish to apply for the exam or who wish to participate in the counselling process must check the eligibility criteria before applying for it. NBE releases NEET PG eligibility criteria along with the information brochure. NEET PG eligibility criteria have been summarised below:Aspirants must possess an MBBS degree/provisional Pass Certificate which is recognised as per the provisions of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956 They should also possess a permanent/ provisional registration certificate of MBBS qualification issued by the Medical Council of India or State Medical CouncilThey must have completed the duration of their internship on or before the middle of August 2025
faqs.question: Can I get into Dr. S.N. Medical College, Jodhpur with 70% in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Dr. S.N Medical College, Jodhpur is up to 447. Good thing to know is that Dr. S.N Medical College, Jodhpur has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like NMC.

reviews_list.review_title: Great infrastructure and various fests organizing college.

review_content.Placements: Great opportunities for all students who want to become doctors and give service to society. Their are excellent results in the NEET PG course and very great teachers. Many students from our college are in India and all over the world, giving their best in the medical field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best thing is campus; their is a cricket ground, basketball court, auditorium, and library. There is a beautiful swimming pool in college at the national level. All programs happen in an auditorium with a crowd capacity of 1200. So the infrastructure is great.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dr. S.N Medical College, Jodhpur.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in my second year of MBBS. There are no campus placements for our class. After graduation, you have to take a PG. There is a very high probability of getting a job in government as well. They give good packages like the highest 45 INR thousand per month and after 4.5 years students have to do one year of internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are average, but it has a very good new academic block. The girls' hostel is also quite old and not very good. But after we came here, new rooms were also given to us in the second year. So it's kind of average in terms of infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of S. N Medical College Jodhpur.

review_content.Placements: There is a one-year compulsory internship in all four attached hospitals of the college, in which every student gets an INR 20,000 per month stipend. An internship has to be done in all the departments for a specific time period. In an internship, clinical exposure is provided on how to treat and diagnose the patient. All the students got 100% jobs in government hospitals. Some of the students are going to further their studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are multiple grounds for football, basketball, volleyball, kabaddi, kho-kho, and cricket, and this college also has a sports club and sports secretary in the student union. This college has a poetry club and a literacy club. There is a library at my college that is well maintained and has lots of books and journals. It's infrastructure is old.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. S.N Medical College, Jodhpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really decent college that gives you overall good skills and is taught by some very good doctors.

content.Placements: SNMC is honestly the second-best college after SMS. The students get selected for medical officer exams or other central government jobs like UPSC and CMS. Students also get good PG seats which are decent and depend mostly on how serious you are about your preparations. But overall the college does give good opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: MBBS students do get big, spacious, well-lit, well-ventilated, and air-conditioned classrooms. Large enough to seat around 300 students. The hostels are average like any other government medical college hostel. The mess food is okay. Since the college location is in the heart of the city, a large number of PGs are available to take for rent as well.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The worst hostel, no college life.

content.Placements: There is no such thing as placement in our field. We have to get a four-year MBBS degree and then clear the NEET PG entrance exams for a postgraduate course. The NEET PG is very tough because we have to clear the entire subjects of all four years.
content.Infrastructure: The college buildings are very old and in need of repair, but there is one new building that is well maintained and air conditioned. The reading room and library are also very well maintained and provide a great environment for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Really decent college that gives you overall good skills and is taught by some very good doctors.
reviews.review_text: MBBS students do get big, spacious, well-lit, well-ventilated, and air-conditioned classrooms. Large enough to seat around 300 students. The hostels are average like any other government medical college hostel. The mess food is okay. Since the college location is in the heart of the city, a large number of PGs are available to take for rent as well.

reviews.review_heading: The worst hostel, no college life.
reviews.review_text: The college buildings are very old and in need of repair, but there is one new building that is well maintained and air conditioned. The reading room and library are also very well maintained and provide a great environment for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and various fests organizing college.
reviews.review_text: The best thing is campus; their is a cricket ground, basketball court, auditorium, and library. There is a beautiful swimming pool in college at the national level. All programs happen in an auditorium with a crowd capacity of 1200. So the infrastructure is great.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. S.N Medical College, Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are average, but it has a very good new academic block. The girls' hostel is also quite old and not very good. But after we came here, new rooms were also given to us in the second year. So it's kind of average in terms of infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Review of S. N Medical College Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: There are multiple grounds for football, basketball, volleyball, kabaddi, kho-kho, and cricket, and this college also has a sports club and sports secretary in the student union. This college has a poetry club and a literacy club. There is a library at my college that is well maintained and has lots of books and journals. It's infrastructure is old.

reviews.review_heading: Explore  Dr. S. N. Medical College Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: The campus of our college is large enough and annually a fest named as a spandan is organized by the student union and by the student contribution. Hostel facility in the college is good with neat and clean rooms. Hostel registration done at the time of admission. Infrastructure of the college is also better.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Sampurnanand Medical College Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text:
The campus is very good, and the environment is also very good and clean. Their lab work is very good and their infrastructure is good, according to the students.
Every sport is played at our college. Many times our college team has won the state-level championship, and many times they have won events in the AIIMS Delhi pulse programme. There is no drinking water, light, or garbage disposal in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Freedom of life is the medical college's motto.
reviews.review_text:
There are almost 15 lecture theaters.
One library, one reading room, football ground, cricket ground, and for any other sports we can play, college has a separate space.
There are several messes for girls and boys.
Separate hostels are there for boys and girls.
Food is normal, but not like home-made food.

reviews.review_heading: Review on my medical college, sharing my experience, hope it will help you and guide you .
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well furnished and air conditioned. Lectures are project based. Labs are available for particular subjects like physiology, biochemistry, forensic medicine, pharmacology and pathology. Well furnished library and reading room is available for self study and for group studies. Hostel is available for both girls and boys. It has light and water facilities, food is average and rooms are also average, both single and double rooms are available. Western and Indian toilet facilities, was...

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the top medical colleges in Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The library is also very good. Air-conditioners are available. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Biochemistry laboratory and physiology laboratory are available. Dissection hall for anatomy, pathology pharmacology microbiology forensic, PSM, etc., are also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. S.N Medical College, Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. There is no Wi-Fi facility. Our classrooms are spacious, and around 400-500 students can accommodate easily. Lecture theatres are well furnished. Library is available and several books are provided. It also provides a reading room. Hostel rooms are small and not clean. The food served in the mess is not good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice. Classes have AC and are well-lightened. Teachers teach us by projectors and overall college is very nice. Hostels are also well hygienic and good rooms are provided to the students. In one room 2 students reside. Food in mess is hygienic and it's like our home.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for UG and PG.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good hostel campus and a good environment for study. Overall, good hygiene and maintenance are maintained on campus. The food served in hostels is average. Clean and green SNMC is our main motive so we are working on that and planting more plants every year. Students are friendly.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of its faculty members, infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not good in this college. In terms of washroom, canteen, classroom, the condition is very bad, and there is no hygiene at all in these places, especially for girls there is not a hygienic washroom available. The canteen is also not at all hygiene. All things mentioned are bad in terms of facilities. Except for sports, which is great in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a great legacy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. The college building is quite old, but most rooms have air-conditioners, so there is no problem in the harsh summer of Jodhpur. Washrooms and toilets are not clean and sanitised, so they need to be worked on daily by the sweepers.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college offers very good teaching and facilities.

review_content.Placements: HBTMC is one of the B.M.C medical colleges run in Mumbai. The college meets the ECFMG eligibility criteria, so students can give USMLE after their MBBS. The stipend amount in internships is like any other college. After MBBS even PG courses are started in the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lecture theatres are spacious and can easily occupy 200 students. The demo rooms are air-conditioned and well ventilated. There are two canteens. Jain food is also available in the mess. Library and reading rooms are present and are air-conditioned.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, academia.

review_content.Placements: There are no direct placements post MBBS for any undergraduate students. You will have to intern for an year compulsorily in a B.M.C. setup working under all major departments for 365 days. No specific hierarchy exists. 100% students who pass will have to intern.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hospital and college infrastructure are really good considering it is a Government College. Hostel is not so great with less amount of space and over crowding at times. No mess exists in the campus so it is expensive to live here. Libraries are not open 24 hours.

content.Placements: Placement rate is good. Most students who study seriously crack NEET PG with a decent rank. Our college hospital has all the facilities available for students to learn, very good patient flow. At last, placement depends on the skills you have, not on the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is fantastic. There are ACs in the library, lecture hall, and corridors. Complete feeling of a private college in a government college. There is proper lighting everywhere, the lifts are available, and the building has a total of 5 floors.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides very good clinical oriented teaching and diversified exposure.

content.Placements: Placements are provided in our course but students have to work hard and make better resumes. There are 200 students in every batch among them majority pursue postgraduation and a few of them start teaching and also prepare for post-graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is not good for first-year and second-year students as they have to stay in the hall on bunk beds. Washroom facilities are not good. Hostel provided is 8 km away from the college and hospital so students have to travel 3 hours every day. Hostel is under construction.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college offers very good teaching and facilities.

content.Placements: HBTMC is one of the B.M.C medical colleges run in Mumbai. The college meets the ECFMG eligibility criteria, so students can give USMLE after their MBBS. The stipend amount in internships is like any other college. After MBBS even PG courses are started in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The lecture theatres are spacious and can easily occupy 200 students. The demo rooms are air-conditioned and well ventilated. There are two canteens. Jain food is also available in the mess. Library and reading rooms are present and are air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good college, academia.

content.Placements: There are no direct placements post MBBS for any undergraduate students. You will have to intern for an year compulsorily in a B.M.C. setup working under all major departments for 365 days. No specific hierarchy exists. 100% students who pass will have to intern.
content.Infrastructure: Hospital and college infrastructure are really good considering it is a Government College. Hostel is not so great with less amount of space and over crowding at times. No mess exists in the campus so it is expensive to live here. Libraries are not open 24 hours.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best for clinical knowledge.

content.Placements: MBBS UG course batch of 2017. On the basis of DMER Counselling (Maharashtra Government.) All students get in internship who have passed in final exams.
content.Infrastructure: All basic facilities available. 3 library are there, classrooms are four. 2 canteens are there, and other facilities for junk food near campus. Wi-Fi also available in every building. Best facilities .
content.Faculty: Best college curriculum, under Maharashtra University of health sciences Nashik. Must visit once. All events take place.

hostel_campus.college_name: H.B.T. Medical College And Dr. R.N. Cooper Municipal General Hospital Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Totally good college in its infrastructure as well as studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is fantastic. There are ACs in the library, lecture hall, and corridors. Complete feeling of a private college in a government college. There is proper lighting everywhere, the lifts are available, and the building has a total of 5 floors.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good clinical oriented teaching and diversified exposure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is not good for first-year and second-year students as they have to stay in the hall on bunk beds. Washroom facilities are not good. Hostel provided is 8 km away from the college and hospital so students have to travel 3 hours every day. Hostel is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers very good teaching and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The lecture theatres are spacious and can easily occupy 200 students. The demo rooms are air-conditioned and well ventilated. There are two canteens. Jain food is also available in the mess. Library and reading rooms are present and are air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, academia.
reviews.review_text: Hospital and college infrastructure are really good considering it is a Government College. Hostel is not so great with less amount of space and over crowding at times. No mess exists in the campus so it is expensive to live here. Libraries are not open 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: Best for clinical knowledge.
reviews.review_text:
All basic facilities available. 
3 library are there, classrooms are four. 
2 canteens are there, and other facilities for junk food near campus. Wi-Fi also available in every building. Best facilities .

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing medical college.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 college buildings, each having spacious classrooms equipped with AC, projector, stage and comfortable benches. There are 2-3 libraries on the whole campus (some with and some without AC). There are separate practical labs for each subject and are well-equipped. There are 3 canteens on the campus (with another under construction). There are many sports activities like football, cricket, volleyball, chess etc.

reviews.review_heading: There are good academic facilities here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned here, and Wi-Fi is available in classrooms. The quality of food served is average, and the hostel facilities are good. Medical facilities are available free of cost in our college. There are 3 libraries. Libraries are good and air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available in libraries.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good facilities. There is no good playground but has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities are available in our college such as Wi-Fi, playground, labs, and classrooms. Medical facilities are available as the college is attached to the hospital. The food available in the canteen is also good. A playground is also available but it is not that big.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure, supportive faculty, amazing clinical postings, and best experience.
reviews.review_text: College building and the college courtyard are the most beautiful things in the entire college. Talking about the labs, they are well organised, having all kinds of specimens, chemicals, charts, models, and microscopes, etc. Which is essential for better learning of students.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and academics along with extra curricular activities .
reviews.review_text: The new college building was established in 2023 which has the best infrastructure among other colleges with all departments in same building. All the classroom are air-conditioned and Wi-Fi is available in every room. Hostel is available from first year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is one of the best in Maharashtra. You must prefer it for PG preparation.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure in terms of labs, library and auditorium. The only bad thing is the mess, and the quality of food served in the mess is not up to the mark. The college doesn't have a playground. The campus is very good, and the cleanliness is good. Hospital staff members are helpful.

admission_process.title: Shri Sai College of Nursing and Paramedical Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shri Sai College of Nursing and Paramedical Science admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in College Level Entrance Test and University Level Entrance Test, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG and Certificate levels in several specialisations.Shri Sai College of Nursing and Paramedical Scienceoffers BHM and B.Sc. at UG level and Certificate at the Certificate level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 80,000 - 8,00,000. Aspirants have to payINR 60,000for Certificate courses.

courses_data.name: Shri Sai College of Nursing and Paramedical Science Certificate Admission 2025

college_info.intro:
Jawaharlal Nehru University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech programme for the duration of 2-years in full-time mode. The university offers BTech specialisations in Mechanical, CSE, Electronics & Communication, and others. BTech students can work in PSUs, private companies, or even in government sectors. JNU MBA students are taught Managerial skills, Communication, and various other skills. JNU MBA students are taught Managerial skills, Communication, and various other skills. The courses are available in various specializations.
JNU BTech and MBA students can work as Managers, Team Leaders, or can even join non-technical fields. Jawaharlal Nehru University is one of the highest-ranked colleges offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are JNU popular programmes:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Decent enough college (according to the fee and all).

review_content.Placements: Decent enough placement if you take the fact into consideration that it is recently established, and also the fact that the faculty are not up to that mark. The highest on-campus package is around 18 LPA, and off-campus is 36+LPA. The median package of 2024 was 8 LPA, so yeah, it offers a decent package for what its fee is.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel could be way better, especially for B.Tech students, as we are the highest fee paying students in JNU. The hostel (Damodar) is roughly 2.54 km away from ELC, where our classes are conducted, and other labs like the computer lab are still 1.54 km away, so that is also an issue, as we don't have any buses from Damodar.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A college that is full of natural and intellectual beauty.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is around 40%. Packages aren't yet disclosed, but the maximum is 39 LPA. Top recruiting companies include S&P Global, Linkiss, Antino Labs, Barclays, IBM, and various other startups. Roles offered are SCRUM master, data analysis, application developer, devOps and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: 24/7 Wi-Fi, a hostel with good food, and a living facility at a very affordable price. A 24/7 open central library with a very versatile and large collection of books and journals, newspapers, articles, and many more things. A different cyber library for students who are pursuing CS Engineering.

faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru University accepts CUET-UG and CUET-PG entrance test scores for admission to several undergraduate, postgraduate, certificate and PG Diploma courses. The University also accepts a few national-level entrance exam scores for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, etc. For admission to BA (Hons.) in Foreign Languages, BSc-MSc Integrated programme in Ayurveda Biology and Certificate of Proficiency courses, JNU accepts CUET-UG scores. The registration window for CUET UG for Jawaharlal Nehru University admission UG courses usually open by February. Further, the CUET UG is held between May and June.
faqs.question: Q: What is the last date for JNU admission?

faqs.answer: JNU MCA admission is based on a valid Central University Entrance Test (Postgraduate) CUET-PG score. CUET PG is an all-India-level entrance exam conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA). According to test-takers, the General Test was easy and the Domain Knowledge section was moderate to tough. Although the questions were on the expected lines and within the CUET PG syllabus but according to some students, a few questions were out of the syllabus and tricky. So, the JNU MCA entrance is not very tough but can be tricky.
faqs.question: Q: Is it tough to get admission to the JNU MCA programme?

faqs.answer: Admission to Jawaharlal Nehru University BA (Hons) in Foreign Languages, BSc-MSc Integrated Programme in Ayurveda Biology and Certificate of Proficiencey (COP) courses is through CUET (UG). Only the aspirants with a valid score of CUET are eligible to take admission in these courses. Moreover, the application for the same has to be submitted by visiting the JNU admission portal.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses of JNU are under CUET?

faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru University is popularly know for its academics since 1969. The university is well-known for its BTech and MBA programme. The courses are UGC recognised and NAAC A+ accredited. It is a goverment/ public university which offers quality education under the guidance of experts. JNU Delhi was spread across 1019 acres which includes library, seminar halls, convocation centre, cafeteria, mess, sports complex, mess, hostel and others.

course_faqs.question: Do I have to pay the full tuition fee for BTech course at JNU if my family doesn't earn much?
course_faqs.answer: No, JNU is quite supportive when it comes to financial backgrounds. The university uses a tiered system to make education affordable. If your family's annual income is below INR 1 Lakh, you fall into the "Economically Most Backward" category and your BTech tuition fee is completely waived, meaning you pay INR 0 for tuition. For those with a family income between INR 1 Lacs and INR 5 Lakhs, the fee is heavily subsidized at just INR 20,833 per semester. Only students whose family income exceeds IN

course_faqs.question: Are there any fees for SC, ST, or PWD students in BTech course at JNU?
course_faqs.answer: JNU follows a very inclusive policy for students from reserved categories. If you belong to the SC, ST, or PH (Physically Handicapped) categories, your BTech tuition fee is entirely waived, regardless of what your family's annual income might be. This means you do not have to worry about the INR 62,500 semester charge at all. However, keep in mind that this waiver only applies to the "Tuition" portion of the bill. You will still be responsible for the recurring semester costs like registration,

course_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at JNU?
course_faqs.answer: There are multiple components included in the JNU BTech course fee, which are one-time chargeable or have to be paid annually/semesterly. The total tuition fee for the UG programme ranges between INR 99,800 and INR 5 lakh. In addition, the one-time fee is INR 6,000. It must be noted that the given fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the MBA fee at JNU?
overview_faqs.answer: Total course fee include multiple components such as tuition fee, admission fee, alumni fee, and caution deposit. Some of the fee components are only charged once. JNU MBA fees is INR 12 lakh. The fee mentioned here is the total tuition fee and is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. For a detailed JNU MBA fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of Jawaharlal Nehru University.

overview_faqs.question: Is it tough to get admission to the JNU MCA programme?
overview_faqs.answer: JNU MCA admission is based on a valid Central University Entrance Test (Postgraduate) CUET-PG score. CUET PG is an all-India-level entrance exam conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA). According to test-takers, the General Test was easy and the Domain Knowledge section was moderate to tough. Although the questions were on the expected lines and within the CUET PG syllabus but according to some students, a few questions were out of the syllabus and tricky. So, the JNU MCA entrance is not very tough but can be tricky.

review_summary.college_name: JNU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Korean - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: B.A. in Korean Studies at JNU.

content.Placements: Basically, if you are very good at the Korean language, you can get a decent job in the private sector. There is no placement cell right now, but it will be there in the upcoming few years. You need to make connections on LinkedIn and get placement on your own. Our alumni help a lot in securing a good position.
content.Infrastructure: The course is excellent. Books are updated, and they are designed to current market trends. Our professors update our course every semester with market trends. The hostel is decent; with the hostel fees, it is excellent. There are some old hostels that have some issues, but they are under renovation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Very good placement for the current year (2025–2026). Cultural events happen almost every week.

content.Placements: In the 2025–2026 placement session, a very good number of students got placed in highly reputed companies. Most of my seniors got packages above 12–13 LPA, and some got placed off campus with the highest package of 40 LPA+. Top roles like software developer, etc., are offered during on-campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for my course is decent. A new building for engineering students is getting ready along with a hostel for more than 2500+ students. Labs are really good, classrooms are fully ventilated and fully AC. There are 21 hostels with very good quality rooms and very tasty food at a very affordable price.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Decent enough college (according to the fee and all).

content.Placements: Decent enough placement if you take the fact into consideration that it is recently established, and also the fact that the faculty are not up to that mark. The highest on-campus package is around 18 LPA, and off-campus is 36+LPA. The median package of 2024 was 8 LPA, so yeah, it offers a decent package for what its fee is.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel could be way better, especially for B.Tech students, as we are the highest fee paying students in JNU. The hostel (Damodar) is roughly 2.54 km away from ELC, where our classes are conducted, and other labs like the computer lab are still 1.54 km away, so that is also an issue, as we don't have any buses from Damodar.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A college that is full of natural and intellectual beauty.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is around 40%. Packages aren't yet disclosed, but the maximum is 39 LPA. Top recruiting companies include S&P Global, Linkiss, Antino Labs, Barclays, IBM, and various other startups. Roles offered are SCRUM master, data analysis, application developer, devOps and many more.
content.Infrastructure: 24/7 Wi-Fi, a hostel with good food, and a living facility at a very affordable price. A 24/7 open central library with a very versatile and large collection of books and journals, newspapers, articles, and many more things. A different cyber library for students who are pursuing CS Engineering.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Our college is overall nice, and it's improving every year.

content.Placements: In my university, the School of Engineering is new, and it was started in 2018, the first batch graduated in 2022. So placement is average, but it's improving every year. Companies like IBM, S&P Global, Amdocs, Emphasis, Antino, etc., have come, and students were placed.
content.Infrastructure: Our building for the School of Engineering is under construction, and it may take up to 2 years to finish. Our current classes are going on in ELC (Engineering lecture complex), which is good with good benches, a projector, and good Wi-Fi, but still not the best. At present damodar hostel is allotted to engineering students, but students can also take other hostel also in the university. Hostels are overall average because they are old. The best hostel at present is Barak. The quality of food provided in the hostel is decent.

admission_overview.title: JNU Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: JNU admissions are based CUET scores of the candidates. The university considers CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for admission with an exception for BTech and MBA. Jawaharlal Nehru University also conducts JNUEE for admission to its PhD programme. The university offers over 100 courses via nearly 20 schools and study centres. The courses are offered across various streams such as Arts, Engineering, Management, Science, etc. at UG, PG and doctoral levels. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: JNU Eligibility & Selection 2026

JNU MBA admission is based on the CAT score, conducted by IIMs. It also accepts CUET-PG scores for admission to MA, MSc, MCA, MPH, MTech, Post Graduate Diploma, and Advanced Diploma courses. For JNU admission 2026 to MSc in Biotechnology and MSc in Computational Biology Programme, shall be through GAT-B scores. paragraphs: JNU admission processis entrance-based. Admission to UG and PG courses is via CUET-UG and CUET-PG, respectively, at JNU. DownloadJNU admit cardto appear for JNU CUET UG andJNU CUET PG tests. For BTech and MBA courses, national-level exam scores such as JEE Main and CAT are also accepted. Check below stages in the admission process:
STEP 1: JNU Application Process 2026
Candidates can apply through the JNU official website (jnu.ac.in). Candidates must have selected JNU as a preference during the CUET application process.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds/Release of Selection List

Candidates are offered admission based on the respective entrance exam scores (for MBA & BTech). These shortlisted candidates have to participate in group discussions and personal interview rounds, after which a final list is released. For admission through CUET, the university will release a merit list or cutoff. JNU UG admission is based on JEE Main score for BTech and CUET-UG for other programmes.
The selection is based on CUET-PG scores of the candidates for PG admission. The university conducts a computer-based test for admission to PhD programme.
STEP 3: Counselling
Selected candidates have to participate in the JNU counselling for course admission (Except for MBA). During the counselling, verification and seat allotment is done.
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates may have to go through a document verification round. Candidates have to pay some fees in order to confirm their seat.
The fee to be paid while applying on the pre-enrolment portal for accepting the admission offer is mentioned in the following table:
What documents are required during UG & COP admission/registration?
The documents to be submitted (in original) at the admission counter in an envelope during registration/admission are as follows:
DownloadJNU admit cardto appear for JNU CUET UG and JNU CUET PG tests.
What is the JNU CUET Counselling Process 2026?

Candidates who appeared for CUET-UG can apply for JNU UG & Certificate of Proficiency (COP) courses. Some of the courses for which CUET score is accepted are BA (H) in Foreign Languages, BSc-MSc integrated course in Ayurveda, and COP programmes. Admission is offered to the JNU School of Language, Literature & Cultural Studies and to the School of Sanskrit & Indic Studies. Aspirants must meet the eligibility criteria. Admisson is based on CUET score and points.

The total course fee structure includes mess fee, registration fee, tuition fee, and more. Each of the fee course structure varies. Aspirants not opting for hostel facilities may also have a lower fee as compared to students opting for the same. JNU fee is on an affordable side. faqs.question: Who is eligible for BSc at JNU?
faqs.answer: For JNU BSc course admission, the course aspirant should have passed Class 12 or any equivalent examination with a minimum 45% aggregate from a recognised board. Candidate should have passed the qualifying exam from a recognised board. It is also necessary that the student carry the educational document at the time of form filling and admission. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Jawaharlal Nehru University?
faqs.answer: No, Jawaharlal Nehru University does not offer direct admission. The university offers admission based on merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national entrance exams like CUET UG, JEE Main, NDA, CAT, CUET PG, and others.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to JNU in BSc?
faqs.answer: For JNU BSc admission, candidates need to apply online for CUET. JNU BSc admission is completely entrance-based and depends upon candidates' performance in theCUET-UG entrance exam. Additionally, before filling out the application, aspirants must check out the eligibility criteria for this UG course. Based on the entrance exam score, the seats are allotted to the selected candidates through counselling. The seat is confirmed after the document verification.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for BSc at JNU?
faqs.answer: JNU BSc seat intake is 87.To get the seat, applicants should complete their eligibility requirements and follow the further admission process. You can go to the JNU website for more details.

faqs.question: What is the MBA fee at JNU?
faqs.answer: Total course fee include multiple components such as tuition fee, admission fee, alumni fee, and caution deposit. Some of the fee components are only charged once. JNU MBA fees is INR 12 lakh. The fee mentioned here is the total tuition fee and is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. For a detailed JNU MBA fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of Jawaharlal Nehru University.

faqs.question: Does JNU accept CAT score?
faqs.answer: Yes, JNU accepts CAT scores for admission in the MBA course. Candidates must appear for this exam and achieve a valid aggregate in the same. They must also appear for a PI round. Based on these, the merit list is released and selected candidates must appear for verification and pay the tuition fees for admission confirmation.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at JNU?
faqs.answer: Yes, JNU offers a two-year full-time MBA course at the postgraduate level via the Atal Bihari Vajpayee School of Management and Entrepreneurship. JNU MBA admission is completely entrance-based and depends on candidates' performance in theCATentrance exam, conducted by IIMs. score are eligible to apply for JNU MBA course.

faqs.question: How many seats are there in JNU for MBA?
faqs.answer: The total seat intake for JNU MBA course is 55. Thus, only this much candidates are admitted to the programme at the time of selection. Candidates shall reach out to the admission office to gather information related to the seat reservation policy and allotment procedure. In the MBA admission process, JNU follows Government of India norms.

faqs.question: What is the last date for JNU admission?
faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru University accepts CUET-UG and CUET-PG entrance test scores for admission to several undergraduate, postgraduate, certificate and PG Diploma courses. The University also accepts a few national-level entrance exam scores for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, etc. For admission to BA (Hons.) in Foreign Languages, BSc-MSc Integrated programme in Ayurveda Biology and Certificate of Proficiency courses, JNU accepts CUET-UG scores.The registration window for CUET UG forJawaharlal Nehru University admissionUG courses usually open byFebruary.Further, the CUET UG is held betweenMay and June.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to JNU without CUET?
faqs.answer: No, candidates can get admission to JNU without CUET if applying for UG and PG courses. To get admission at Jawaharlal Nehru University, candidates must appear for th CUET exam. JNU admission to most of the UG, PG and Diploma courses are based on candidates' performance in theCUET-UG&CUET-PGscores. ForJNU MBA admission 2025, CUET-PG is not validand is dependent on CAT scores.  Also, PhD admissions do not require CUET.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MA admission at JNU?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates seeking admission to the JNU MA course must appear for theCUET-PG entrance exam, conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA). The students are admitted on merit based on their performance in the entrance test and the deprivation points are added to their score in accordance with the approved admission Policy and Procedures of the University. The CUET PG 2023 exam will be held for postgraduate course admissions to over 50 Central and participating Universities.

faqs.question: Is Jawaharlal Nehru University admissions are open?
faqs.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru University admissions 2026 is open. The university admission is expected to open in Jan/ Feb 2026. Studnets can apply directly through the online application. JNU New Delhi application is based through the online application.

placement_data.title: JNU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: JNU placement information 2025 is not available. However, according to JNU’s School of Engineering (SOE) placement report 2023 , the overall highest package (Off Campus) offered in 2023 was INR 33 LPA . The highest and average package ( On-Campus ) received during JNU SOE placement 2023 was INR 16 LPA and INR 11 LPA.

Further, as per the NIRF report 2025 released, a total of 30 students were placed and 327 students were selected out of total 357 students during JNU UG 3-year placements 2024. In PG 2-year programs, 188 students were placed and 1244 students were selected for higher studies out of total 1432 students during PG 2-year placements 2024.
