description: JNU cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the JNU JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

JNU JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the JNU CSE cutoff 2025 was 37965 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 55021, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the JNU B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 37965 and 55021 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 37965 and 55021, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at JNU. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at JNU to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of JNU. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

JNU CUET PG cutoff 2025 for Round 3 has been announced across multiple courses. The cutoff was released for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. For the students belonging to the General AI quota, the cutoff scores varied between 44.67 and 78.33, with MA in Sociology being the most competitive for admission. The easiest course to get admission to was M.Sc. in Life Sciences (Research) with a closing rank of 60.33. JNU cutoff 2025 for MCA admission is 73 for students belongi

Jawaharlal Nehru University admission to the Post Graduate Programme is based on the performance of the candidates in CUET PG and deprivation points earned by the eligible candidates taken together. Candidates seeking admission to JNU can refer to the table below to check out some important dates related to CUET PG.

JNU offers admission to PG courses, including MA, MSc, MCA, MTech and MPH through CEUT PG scores. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise CUET PG counselling rounds for JNU admission to the postgraduate courses.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Technology and M.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering with last round cutoff scores of 509 and 350, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 509. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 338 and 443 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at Jawaharlal Nehru University. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

The JNU UG cutoff 2025 is out, wherein the most challenging specialisation is BA (Hons) in French for admission among the General AI quota, with a closing rank of 71.93. The higher the cutoff score, the higher the competition, and vice versa. Candidates who are not eligible to get admission to the most competitive specialisation can also get admission to BA (Hons) in Japanese with a lenient second-round closing score of 70.43 for the same category under the All India quota.

The JNU cutoff for admission to the B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration specialisation was released through NCHMCT scores. During the JNU NCHMCT cutoff 2023, the last-round rank for B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration was 6518. When compared to previous year cutoffs, a decreasing trend can be observed throughout the years. Check out the year-wise cutoffs from the table given below:

As per JNU cutoff 2021, the closing scores for M.Tech in Data Science was 64, for M.Tech. in Nanoelectronics was 57 and for M.Tech. in Nanoscience was 62 for the General category All India candidates. Tabulated below are the round-wise and category-wise closing scores for JNU MTech cutoff:

JNU also accepts DASA UG scores for BTech admission. For 2022, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 113. On analysing the cutoff 2022 with 2021, there is a huge decreasing trend in the closing rank whereas when 2022 cutoff is compared with cutoff 2020, there was a slight change in the cutoff. Candidates seeking admission to JNU can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

After analysing the last round of JNU CCMT cutoff 2025, Computer Science and Technology, and Electronics and Communication Engineering saw the highest cutoff for admission for students in the General AI category.

For the OBC category, All India quota, the GATE cutoff 2025 ranged from 338 and 443, wherein MTech in Computer Science and Technology was the most competitive to avail a seat for. Students can make use of the filters made available below to view the cutoff for various rounds, categories

The JNU cutoff 2024 was determined for the third round of seat allotment. The JNU JNUEE cutoff 2024 has been announced for the admission to UG and PG courses based on JNUEE scores. The JNU third round cutoff 2024 ranged between 57.89 and 74.11 for the General AI category candidates. During the 2024 cutoff, the course with the highest closing scores was BA (Hons.) in French with a cutoff score of 74.11 which is also the most desired course as per the Round 3 data.

highlights.description:
JNU is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #9 in the Overall category, #2 under University, #21 under Research Institutions, and #7 under SDGs Institutions. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #580 to JNU. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in JNU rankings.
Read less

3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Delhi In 2025

nirf.description:
Over the years, JNU has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the JNU's rankings in 'Overall' category have displayed a fluctuating trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2025, JNU climbed 1 rank to #9 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'University' category have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, JNU's rank is #2, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Research Institutions' category have displayed a decreasing trend when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, JNU fell 3 ranks to #21 rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
JNU has received strong ranks by the Outlook under the 'Central Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook 2025.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

qs_world.description:
JNU has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankingss for JNU indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, JNU climbed 22 ranks to #558 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, JNU fell 20 ranks to #130 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, JNU fell 2 ranks to #16 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

hostel_campus.college_name: JNU Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

hostel.description: Hostel system includes spacious and well furnished 18 hostels with accommodation capacity of more than  5500 for boys and girls and one complex accommodating married students. There is a hostel for working women‘s with accommodation capacity of 201 inmates. Apart from hygienic foods, hostels provide recreational facilities includes TVs, indoor games, health Club, and PCOs etc.

data: Central Library, Computer Centre, Health Centre, Sports Facilities, Hostels, Guest House, Canteen, Grievance redressal Cell

library.description: 24*7 central library with reading halls. Wi-Fi enabled library allows users to access offline and online information anytime. It uses Virtual Integrated Library Management Software (VTLS) and provides access to 22 databases through UGC-Infonet consortia. The library has a unique collection of one lakh plus e-Books from various international publishers. Central Library subscribes to 37 Online databases having 50,000+ e-journals; 61+ Online Individual Journals and 213 Print Journals. In addition to Central Library, JNU gets access to 21 Databases /E-resources access from INFLIBNET. Central Library has perpetual access to South Asia Archive and Time of India Archive. School wise library and air-conditioned reading halls are also available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Athletics Track, Taekwondo, Weight-Lifting Mountaineering & Trekking

reviews.review_heading: B.A. in Korean Studies at JNU.
reviews.review_text: The course is excellent. Books are updated, and they are designed to current market trends. Our professors update our course every semester with market trends. The hostel is decent; with the hostel fees, it is excellent. There are some old hostels that have some issues, but they are under renovation.

reviews.review_heading: Very good placement for the current year (2025–2026). Cultural events happen almost every week.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for my course is decent. A new building for engineering students is getting ready along with a hostel for more than 2500+ students. Labs are really good, classrooms are fully ventilated and fully AC. There are 21 hostels with very good quality rooms and very tasty food at a very affordable price.

reviews.review_heading: Decent enough college (according to the fee and all).
reviews.review_text: The hostel could be way better, especially for B.Tech students, as we are the highest fee paying students in JNU. The hostel (Damodar) is roughly 2.54 km away from ELC, where our classes are conducted, and other labs like the computer lab are still 1.54 km away, so that is also an issue, as we don't have any buses from Damodar.

reviews.review_heading: A college that is full of natural and intellectual beauty.
reviews.review_text: 24/7 Wi-Fi, a hostel with good food, and a living facility at a very affordable price. A 24/7 open central library with a very versatile and large collection of books and journals, newspapers, articles, and many more things. A different cyber library for students who are pursuing CS Engineering.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is overall nice, and it's improving every year.
reviews.review_text: Our building for the School of Engineering is under construction, and it may take up to 2 years to finish. Our current classes are going on in ELC (Engineering lecture complex), which is good with good benches, a projector, and good Wi-Fi, but still not the best. At present damodar hostel is allotted to engineering students, but students can also take other hostel also in the university. Hostels are overall average because they are old. The best hostel at present is Barak. The quality of food pr...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, not good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is decent, and the hostel is something you would love for its affordability. The classroom is decent, library is filled with good books. Mess is okay-ish, and canteens are affordable. The medical facility is also decent. Sports are okay-ish (I am not a sports person, so not an actual complaint). The gym totally needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, and the infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available on campus with unlimited data in JNU hostels, classes, library, and labs. There is high-speed data. Hostel room conditions are satisfactory. Mess food is better, and it is at a very low price. Many canteens are available in JNU. There is a health center for students, and it is good, and all facilities are free. There is a stadium for sports, and in most of the hostels badminton court and a volleyball court.

reviews.review_heading: Jawaharlal Nehru University from my view.
reviews.review_text: Campus size is 1,100 acres full of forest vibes and full of animals and beautiful birds. Infrastructure is decent as it is 60 years old in a polluted city like Delhi we are literally living in a paradise. But also due to many posters of political parties sticking everywhere, it feels kind of ugly.

reviews.review_heading: Highly satisfied to be part of JNU. Highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: There is a 24/7 library where you can study, along with access to round-the-clock Wi-Fi. The classrooms are world-class, providing exposure to top-notch facilities at every corner. The hostel mess offers quality food at very affordable prices, and there is a health center where you can get medical attention at no cost.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus life with excellent learning experience.
reviews.review_text: There are 18 hostels, all equipped with mess facility bills ranging Rs. 2500 to Rs. 3500. Classrooms are in good condition some have ACs most don't. There are also gyms in many hostels. There is a stadium. There is a fully equipped health center all for free. Canteens are there in every building with nominal prices.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with infrastructure, facilities, and teaching approach.
reviews.review_text: There are three buildings only for cultural and linguistic studies. Classrooms are big enough with comfortable benches and air-conditioners, campus has 24/7 Wi-Fi facility, 24/7 library, and reading rooms. There are language labs where students can translate real-time video and listen to real-time communication. Hostels also have 24/7 Wi-Fi facility, tasty food, and good infrastructure at their price. As the fee is only Rs. 268 so for that price the hostels and their facilities are excellent. Th...

reviews.review_heading: The strange face of JNU.
reviews.review_text: The living quality is okay compared to what we pay for but sometimes we don't have water in our dormitory and sometimes even Wi-Fi doesn't work. But the medical facility is good and free of any cost for students which is quite good. If you consider this is a government college.

reviews.review_heading: I think JNU is the best university in India.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good for all students studying at JNU. We have a library, wifi on the whole campus, smart classroom. The quality of mess food is average and very affordable, with free medical facilities for all students as well as sports facilities and a stadium on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is not worth it in JNU, but majorly it is.
reviews.review_text: It is a sad reality of JNU that B.A. 1st-year boys are arranged to stay in dormitories, which are adjustable in winter, but in summer, you'll be seated unless you protest or make other arrangements on your own. Once you are allotted to any hostel, everything is on track, and you will enjoy the services at a minimal cost in a city like Delhi.

reviews.review_heading: The old but vibrant campus of JNU may not offer placements, but the name JNU matters.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of JNU is great, but the vibrant campus makes up for it. Wi-Fi facility is available everywhere on the campus. Classrooms are not that great, but the fantastic professors make up for it. The library is open 24/7 with great facilities. The mess food and canteen food are both healthy, tasty, and budget-friendly. Free medical help is available at the JNU health center. A proper gym and sports ground are available.

college_info.college_name: JNU Faculty: Professors, Assistant Professors, Salary

data.description: Jawaharlal Nehru University has over 650 faculty members . There are around 65 JNU departments, centers and schools of study. All these faculty members work as departmental heads, senior/assistant professors and lecturers. The faculty members are from all over the country, and represent a wide range of subjects. Several JNU faculty members are PhD holders, or are pursuing a PhD.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jawaharlal Nehru University

likes.text: Every year, our college organises a job fair for students, where all top companies like HCL, Wipro, Convergys, British Telecom offers placements to freshers with nice salary package.
In future, they provide many good opportunities after completing post-graduation from JNU with a good salary package.

The quality of food served in the hostel is good, and the hostel rooms are very good and spacious.

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered at SKUAST (Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Kashmir) Jammu is INR 45,000 per month. The average package offered is INR 30,000 per month, with a lowest salary of INR 15,000 per month. reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Jammu.

review_content.Placements: There are no placement programs in this college. Training and internships are offered by prestigious universities. Top recruiting companies are Bayer, etc. Few students are eligible for international internships for 2 months in America.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our university has all equipment and chemicals in the laboratory. Classrooms are air-conditioned. It also has smart boards for better learning.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable. Teachers are regularly monitored by the Dean and VC. They also conduct classes regularly. They provide practical experience to students. At the end of the degree, a RAWE program is conducted through which ground-level knowledge is accumulated. This university keeps a close eye on the teaching staff members and course curriculum. All professors are dedicated to their work.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Vegetable Science - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: There are good infrastructure and facilities here.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is not very active in this university. Students may need to find jobs and internships programs on their own. The placement cell sometimes provides information regarding jobs and internships on WhatsApp group but without any follow-up from them.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and department are highly functional here. The hostels are very good with every facility, and a medical centre is available near the hostel only. A gym and sports centre for sports and games are available. A shopping complex has been established where daily needed things can be purchased. There is a canteen facility, but it is not up to the mark. Library facilities are commendable. A highly equipped library with online facilities is available.

faqs.answer: Aspirants seeking admission to SKUAST BSc (Hons) must complete Class 12 or an equivalent examination from a recognised board with PCB/ PCM/ PCBM/ Agriculture (with Science subjects), besides English with 50% aggregate for OM, NRI/ NRI-sponsored category. The aggregate required is 40% for reserved categories. Candidates from states/ UTs other than Jammu and Kashmir & Ladakh can only seek admission under the NRI/ NRI sponsored quota for BSc (Hons) Agriculture, BSc (Hons) Horticulture and against Self Financing, seats for PG courses kept under the All India Basis category.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility for BSc (Hons) at SKUAST Jammu?

faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu does not offer direct admission. Aspirants first need to fill out the application form for the preferred course and then appear for SKUAST-J CET conducted by the university. SKUAST-J CET for UG courses is offered for a duration of three-years. For PG courses, the duration is two and a half year. Once the selection round is completed, the university releases a category-wise merit list. Shortlisted aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join SKUAST directly?

faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pay a non-refundable application fee to register for a course at SKUAST Jammu. The application fee for SKUAST is mentioned below:CourseApplication FeeApplication Fee with Late FeeUGINR 2,000INR 3,000PGINR 2,500INR 3,500
faqs.question: Q: What is the application fee for SKUAST Jammu?

faqs.answer: SKUAST accepts UG, PG and PhD students on the basis of valid scores in SKUAST J CET exam. Aspirants applying through ICAT Quota are offered seats through All India Counselling by ICAR after CUET. Admission under VCI Quota is offered through NEET based on the list provided by VCI via their counselling portal.

review_summary.college_name: SKUAST Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Information regarding our college.

content.Placements: Colleges offer placements and study is very good. Agriculture offers lots of scope in this field and it also gives students practical knowledge. Agriculture is the main source of income it has many career opportunities for students and college is also good.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels have good infrastructure and more hostels are also in progress. Attendees and warden are good. Hostel has good facilities like washing machines and parking space. Food is also good and timing provided is on basis of students care.

individual_reviews.course: M.V.Sc in Vety. Pharmacology & Toxicology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A detailed review of Veterinary College, SKUAST-Jammu.

content.Placements: There are around 4-5 postgraduation seats in each department. Students receive decent salary packages ranging from 5 LPA - 1.5 crore per annum, in many pharmaceutical and feed companies like Intas, Venkys, and Mother Dairy. The university organizes academia-industry meetings to help place deserving students easily.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are digital and laboratories are well equipped with all the equipment for high quality research in pharmacology and toxicology. The college library is huge and contains thousands of books from all sectors of veterinary and animal sciences. Hostels offer single seater, double-seater, and NRI quota rooms, a gym, a mess providing decent food and medical facilities during office hours. There is a large playground for outdoor sports and a hall for indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Jammu.

content.Placements: There are no placement programs in this college. Training and internships are offered by prestigious universities. Top recruiting companies are Bayer, etc. Few students are eligible for international internships for 2 months in America.
content.Infrastructure: Our university has all equipment and chemicals in the laboratory. Classrooms are air-conditioned. It also has smart boards for better learning.
content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable. Teachers are regularly monitored by the Dean and VC. They also conduct classes regularly. They provide practical experience to students. At the end of the degree, a RAWE program is conducted through which ground-level knowledge is accumulated. This university keeps a close eye on the teaching staff members and course curriculum. All professors are dedicated to their work.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Vegetable Science - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: There are good infrastructure and facilities here.

content.Placements: The placement cell is not very active in this university. Students may need to find jobs and internships programs on their own. The placement cell sometimes provides information regarding jobs and internships on WhatsApp group but without any follow-up from them.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and department are highly functional here. The hostels are very good with every facility, and a medical centre is available near the hostel only. A gym and sports centre for sports and games are available. A shopping complex has been established where daily needed things can be purchased. There is a canteen facility, but it is not up to the mark. Library facilities are commendable. A highly equipped library with online facilities is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this government university as it is perfect with great exposures.

content.Placements: Students get internships in great industries all over Jammu and in adorning states, which amplifies the great performance in our personality.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has the most the biggest library in Jammu and Kashmir with the highest number of books available. There are Wi-Fi, labs, the library, etc. In our campus, we have different 11 blocks for different departments which include minimum 3 research labs in each department with ample of fields with a stream in between for research. There are a student centre, sports complex, sports ground, the largest auditorium of Jammu & Kashmir and large classrooms which can accomodate about 150 students with air-conditioners which are not usually provided by governments university. Hostels for UG has a single room for students with new infrastructure.

admission_overview.college_name: SKUAST Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: SUKAST admissionis based on SKUAST J-CET (SKUAST Jammu common entrance test) conducted by the university.Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agriculture Science and Technology (SKUAST) Jammuis a state University, accredited by the National Agricultural Education Accreditation Board, ICAR. The university offers UG, PG, diploma, certificate, and doctoral degrees in Agriculture, Animal Husbandry, and Veterinary Science. The University has four departments that offer 67 courses.

SKUAST Jammu admits students of UG and PG based on an entrance test conducted by SKUAST Jammu called SKUAST J-CET. Another way to take admission in SKUAST is through the CUET test for free seats only. The entrance test is mandatory for all students except self-finance or students allotted seats by the state government. Few in-service students are nominated by the state govt. on free seats. The table below gives a brief ofSKUAST admissionhighlights:
Particulars
SKUAST Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
UG courses:INR 21,300 - INR 28,800
PG courses:INR 27,500 - INR 2.4 lakh
How to apply?
https://skuast.org/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

SKUAST offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. Candidates need to meet the eligibility criteria set for the applied programme. The basic eligibility is Class 12 for UG courses whereas graduation is required for PG programmes. Below areSKUAST coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Bachelor’s degree in the respective/ related subjects with a minimum of 55%-60% aggregate
MAT,CAT,CMAT+ GDPI

SKUAST total fee includes multiple components such as admission fee, tuition fee, examination, caution deposit, etc. Some of the fee components are one-time payable at the time of admission. While aspirants need to pay tuition fees every semester. Below areSKUAST feeand intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Out of the total intake, the university reserves some seats for reserved category candidates. Below is category-wise SKUAST reservation:

SKUAST conducts its own entrance exam for admission to UG and PG courses. Besides, aspirants also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility requirements for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in SKUAST Jammu:
STEP 1: SKUAST Jammu Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred course. Aspirants need to fill out the form and pay an application fee of INR 2,000 for UG and INR 2,500 for PG programmes.
STEP 2: Selection

SKUAST shortlists candidates for UG and PG courses based on SKUAST-CET score. Admission to the seats under the ICAR quota will be made on the basic list provided by ICAR via All India Counselling by ICAR after CUET.
STEP 3: Merit List and Counselling

Once the selection rounds is over, the university releases a category-wise merit list. All the selections made by the university to UG and PG courses is provisional till final verification of eligibility of the candidates. Qualified aspirants, as per merit, are called for counselling on a specified date and time for consideration of admission to various courses. Selected aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Jammu Admission Process check out the below video:

courses_data.name: SKUAST Jammu BSc (Hons) Admission 2025
courses_data.description: SKJUST offers a three-year BSc (Hons) programme inAgricultureand Horticulture specialisations. Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 or equivalent examination withPhysics, Chemistry,Biologyor PCM or PCMB or Agriculture withEnglishwith at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for BSc (Hons) course. The selection for BSc (Hons) is based on SKUAST-J CET. Admission for free or self-financing seats in ICAR quota is through All India Counselling by ICAR after CUET conducted by NTA.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Sc at SKUAST?
faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu has a total intake of176. Candidates are offered seat in BSc (Hons) based on SKUSAT-J CET score. Selected aspirants need to participate in SKUAST Counselling round. Candidates need to bring the specified documents for verification. Once the seat is allotted, aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BSc (Hons) at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: Aspirants seeking admission to SKUAST BSc (Hons)must complete Class 12 or an equivalent examination from a recognised board with PCB/ PCM/ PCBM/ Agriculture (with Science subjects), besides English with 50% aggregate for OM, NRI/ NRI-sponsored category. The aggregate required is 40% for reserved categories. Candidates from states/ UTs other than Jammu and Kashmir & Ladakh can only seek admission under the NRI/ NRI sponsored quota for BSc (Hons) Agriculture, BSc (Hons) Horticulture and against Se

courses_data.name: SKUAST Jammu MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: SKUAST Jammu offers two-year MSc course at the PG level. The university offers MSc in Agriculture, Horticulture,Forestryand Agricultural Engineering. Candidates who have passed a bachelor's degree in related subjects with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for reserved category) can apply. The university also offers MSc in Basic Sciences. Aspirants with a bachelor's degree with at least 55% aggregate can apply for Basic Sciences.

faqs.question: Is MSc available at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: Yes, SKUAST Jammu offers two-year MSc course spread across four semesters. MSc is available in Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry and Agricultural Engineering. Candidates can also apply for MSc in Basic Sciences. Aspirants with a bachelor's degree in relevant subjects can apply for MSc programme. The selection for SKUAST MSc is based on SKUAST-J CET score.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for MSc at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu conducts SKUAST-J CET for admission to MSc course. The university conducts the exam for a duration of two and a half years. The exam includes one question paper each for concerned major subject group. The paper include 150 multiple-choice questions, each with four options. For correct answer 1 mark is given and for incorrect answer -¼ mark is deducted.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MSc at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SKUAST Jammu MSc isINR 27,500.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Below is the other fee component for MSc:Fee ComponentFeeOne-time feeINR 22,750Hostel feeINR 55,565

courses_data.name: SKUAST Jammu MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, CMAT, CAT, ICAR AIEEA
courses_data.description: SKUAST Jammu offers a two-year MBA programme at the PG level. Candidates who have passed BSc Agriculture/ BVSc & AH/ BTech Horticulture/ BSc Dairying/ BSc Forestry/ BSc Fisheries with at least 55% aggregate can apply for MBA Agriculture Business Management. Aspirants with any other graduate degree with at least 55% aggregate can also apply.

faqs.question: What are the selection criteria for MBA at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu selects candidates for MBA based on entrance exam score and merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants need to have a bachelor's degree in any discipline to apply for MBA. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams such as CAT, MAT and CMAT for MBA admission. Selected candidates are further called for a group discussion and personal interview round.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass BSc Agriculture/ BVSc & AH/ BTech Agriculture Engineering/ BSc Horticulture/ BSc Dairying/ BSc Forestry/ BSc Fisheries with at least 55% aggregate or equivalent CGPA to apply for SKUAST Jammu MBA programme. Aspirants with any other graduate degree with a minimum of 55% aggregate can also apply.

faqs.question: What documents are required for MBA admission at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: Selected candidates after completion of the selection rounds need to come for document verification. Aspirants can bring the below documents during interview or at the time of counselling:Detailed marks certificate/ PDC/ Degree cerificate for bachelor's degree from concerned board/ universityDate of Birth Certificate (Marticulation)Detailed Marks Certificate (Class 12)Character Certificate by the institute last attendedMigration Certificate from the institute last attended

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by SKUAST?
faqs.answer: Yes, SKUAST Jammu conducts SKUAST-J Common Entrance Test for admission to UG, PG and PhD courses. It is a three-year exam for UG and two and a half year exam for PG courses. The paper for UG courses contains 180 multiple choice questions with each carrying on mark. In PG, the exam paper have 150 questions each with four options.

faqs.question: Can I join SKUAST directly?
faqs.answer: SKUAST Jammu does not offer direct admission. Aspirants first need to fill out the application form for the preferred course and then appear for SKUAST-J CET conducted by the university. SKUAST-J CET for UG courses is offered for a duration of three-years. For PG courses, the duration is two and a half year. Once the selection round is completed, the university releases a category-wise merit list. Shortlisted aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the admission criteria at SKUAST Jammu?
faqs.answer: SKUAST accepts UG, PG and PhD students on the basis of valid scores in SKUAST J CET exam.  Aspirants applying through ICAT Quota are offered seats through All India Counselling by ICAR after CUET. Admission under VCI Quota is offered throughNEETbased on the list provided by VCI via their counselling portal.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for SKUAST BSc (Hons) admission?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission toSKUAST BSc (Hons)must have passed the Class 12 or an equivalent examination from a recognised board with PCB/ PCM/ PCBM/ Agriculture (with Science subjects), besides English with 50% aggregate for OM, NRI/ NRI-sponsored category, and 40% aggregate for reserved categories.Candidates hailing from states/ UTs other than Jammu and Kashmir & Ladakh can only seek admission under the NRI/ NRI sponsored quota for BSc (Hons) Agriculture, BSc (Hons) Horticulture and against Self Financing, seats for Postgraduate courses kept under the All India Basis category.

highlights.description: SKUAST has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #23 in the Agriculture and Allied Sectors category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around SKUAST rankings:

rankings.highlight: 2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Jammu And Kashmir In 2025

nirf.description:
SKUAST has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, SKUAST's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SKUAST's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, SKUAST fell 3 ranks to #23 rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: SKUAST Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Information regarding our college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels have good infrastructure and more hostels are also in progress. Attendees and warden are good. Hostel has good facilities like washing machines and parking space. Food is also good and timing provided is on basis of students care.

reviews.review_heading: A detailed review of Veterinary College, SKUAST-Jammu.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are digital and laboratories are well equipped with all the equipment for high quality research in pharmacology and toxicology. The college library is huge and contains thousands of books from all sectors of veterinary and animal sciences. Hostels offer single seater, double-seater, and NRI quota rooms, a gym, a mess providing decent food and medical facilities during office hours. There is a large playground for outdoor sports and a hall for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sher-e-Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology of Jammu.
reviews.review_text: Our university has all equipment and chemicals in the laboratory. Classrooms are air-conditioned. It also has smart boards for better learning.

reviews.review_heading: There are good infrastructure and facilities here.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and department are highly functional here. The hostels are very good with every facility, and a medical centre is available near the hostel only. A gym and sports centre for sports and games are available. A shopping complex has been established where daily needed things can be purchased. There is a canteen facility, but it is not up to the mark. Library facilities are commendable. A highly equipped library with online facilities is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this government university as it is perfect with great exposures.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has the most the biggest library in Jammu and Kashmir with the highest number of books available. There are Wi-Fi, labs, the library, etc. In our campus, we have different 11 blocks for different departments which include minimum 3 research labs in each department with ample of fields with a stream in between for research. There are a student centre, sports complex, sports ground, the largest auditorium of Jammu & Kashmir and large classrooms which can accomodate about 150 students wi...

reviews.review_heading: SKUAS Jammu Sheer e Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available but the infrastructure is not very good. The library is present. Wi-Fi is not working somewhere. Hostel rooms are okay but the food of mess is not good. The money they took from us is pretty high but the quality of the food is not good. The canteen is also present.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The hostel, sports complex, food, and cafeteria are the highlights over here. The course and infrastructure are some of the things that are good over here. You will be willing to go to your university if you are admitted over here. Mostly seniors are very helpful over here. No ragging or anything like that happens over here.

reviews.review_heading: Overall its good, I mean you can go for it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is fantastic you can roam around it feels like you are in heaven the weather is good everything, the weather is nostalgic and you can roam here and there are proper bathrooms and restrooms are wuite hygienic and the park are good.

reviews.review_heading: A university which is good but with few cons.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about infrastructure, it's pretty good over here. Hostels are good too:single room for each person (boys) and sharing for girls. Wi-Fi is available, a central library is also available over here. Other than that, AC's are installed in every classroom. Gym facility is also available and there is a sports complex where you can play different games like badminton, table tennis etc.

reviews.review_heading: It's a rough and ready institute. Despite of poor infrastructure academics is really amazing.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Chattha campus is well developed but it's really poor in rs pura campus. Quality of labs is poor. Equipments are also not available many a times. Sophisticated Equipments are usually not available and if available students are not allowed to use them. Sports facility is also poor. Many times students have to arrange for sports gear on their own. Hostels should't be taken into consideration. They are not for humans.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. It has proper Wi-Fi and library. Not so well-developed labs but classrooms are great. Staffs are very supportive. Food in the hostels is excellent as well as in the canteen. We have a proper sports facility here, and there are frequent games for all students.

faqs.answer: A:    PSG College of Arts and Science - PSGCAS has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.PhilCandidates having a minimum of 55% marks and above in the Master's degree and working as Full- time Research Fellows / Technical Assistants / Research Assistants in time-bound research schemes of one year duration or more in the University Departments / Research Departments of Affiliated Colleges / Research Institutions approved by the University shall be eligible to pursue the course leading to M.Phil., Degree.A relaxation of 5% of marks, from 55% to 50%, or an equivalent relaxation of grade may be allowed for the candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (non-creamy layer)/differently-abled and other categories of candidates as per the decision of UGC from time to time and for the candidates who had obtained their Master's degree prior to September 19,  1991. The eligibility marks of 55% (or an equivalent grade in a point scale wherever grading system is followed) and the relaxation of 5% to the categories mentioned above are permissible based only on the qualifying marksPh.D.The candidates should have passed a post-graduate degree course either with SSLC + HSC + UG + PG (i.e.,  10 + 2 + 3 + 2) or with 11-years SSLC + PUC + UG + PG (i.e.,  11 + 1 + 3 + 2) or with 10-years SSLC + 3 years Diploma + 2 years UG degree + 2 years PG (i.e.,  10 + 3 + 2 + 2) or with 10 years SSLC + HSC + 4 years UG degree and 1 year PG degree (i.e.,  10 + 2 + 4 + 1). reviews_list.review_title: Only a positive comment about this college.

review_content.Placements: More than 70% of students get placed with more than 1 crore per annum in top companies of the board. Every student gets a chance to do internships as a research assistant. review_summary.college_name: PSGCAS Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science with Data Analytics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Placements are decent, but HR expects students to have extra skills.

content.Placements: 90% of students who opt for placements are placed. Placement training is provided from the 1st year of college until the final year. Packages range from 2 LPA to 18 LPA. Accenture and CAT are the top recruiters. Internships are researched by students themselves. The Data Analyst role is very popular.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are average compared to other colleges. The library is well-equipped with a lot of collections of literary works. Hostel Wi-Fi and food are good. Sports are given a lot of emphasis. Basketball courts are the best here, and the football field as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My experience at PSG College of Arts and Science.

content.Placements: Placement at PSG College of Arts and Sciences is average. Around 60-70% of students from our department were able to get placed through campus drives. The highest package offered was approximately 6 LPA, while the lowest package is around 2-2.5 LPA. Most of the recruiting companies are IT services and consulting firms.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course is satisfactory and well-maintained. The classrooms are spacious, clean and have proper seating with good ventilation. Most classrooms are equipped with projectors. The Wi-Fi facility is available across the campus, and the speed is pretty okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Only a positive comment about this college.

content.Placements: More than 70% of students get placed with more than 1 crore per annum in top companies of the board. Every student gets a chance to do internships as a research assistant. Students are said to search for internships on their own, and there is no specific allotment made for internships.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available. Labs are provided for every related course. There is a library with a large number of books. Most of the hostel students are unhappy with the food supplied.
content.Faculty: Teachers are really very friendly, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is always updated for benefits of the future and the well-being of students. It prepares students to be ready for everything. Exam levels are up to student's preparation. The pass percentage is 33%. Faculty members who signed for our course are very knowledgeable and experienced in teaching.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Corporate Secretaryship - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an amazing college with so many facilities and with an eco-friendly environment.

content.Placements: The placement section is amazing, with so many facilities available. The placement section gives us a lot of training in placement enhancement, aptitude, general reasoning, and group discussion practices, so that we can excel in interviews. It is the best placement section I have ever seen.
content.Infrastructure: Wonderful facilities with amazing infrastructure. The college has an eco-friendly environment. Everyone is so friendly and from various parts of the country. We can learn new things and adapt to the environment very easily. I would recommend this college to everyone.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Placements were not good at that time, only 5% got placed. Companies like L&T, Infosys, and Wipro came to campus. The offer was just 15-20k per month. Placements were available for both UG and PG. The placement process for UG started in the 3rd year, after 5 semesters, through a training program. After completing the training program, the placements will begin. PG is in its final year, and placements are ongoing.
content.Infrastructure: There were different types of hostels. Facilities for improvement in those hostels, including a single cot, bathrooms, and cupboards, are a must. There were common bathrooms there. A comfortable hostel with all facilities available, providing separate accommodation for boys and girls. An exclusive hostel is available for international students. The hostel has an exclusive library for inmates, and internet facilities are available. The food dining hall and kitchen offer a home-food type experience. The college focuses on the continual development of infrastructural facilities.

paragraphs: Admissions are primarily merit-based at PSGCAS. Candidates can follow the below steps to get a seat in the college:
Step 1: Application:

Aspirants can apply online on the college's website for admission. Candidates have to create an account fo fill out the form. Aspirants can pay the application fees via any of the online payment modes.
Step 2: Selection:
The college selects aspirants for admission based on their merit. PSGCAS considers scores in entrance exam for admission.
Step 3: Counselling:

The selected candidates send an individual mail with details of their allotted counselling date, slot and session. During the counselling process, once the programme is chosen, transfer to other programmes is not allowed.
Step 4: Payment of Fee:

Candidates have to pay the fees on or before the deadline in the admission slip. Admission process will be intimated to the candidates through mail from time to time. Aspirants also need to report at the campus for document verification. Check below the documents required at the time of admission:
PSG College of Arts and Science fee includes tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually forPSGCAS admission.

facilities: Class 12 Result copy (for UG-after the publicati

reviews.review_heading: Placements are decent, but HR expects students to have extra skills.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are average compared to other colleges. The library is well-equipped with a lot of collections of literary works. Hostel Wi-Fi and food are good. Sports are given a lot of emphasis. Basketball courts are the best here, and the football field as well.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at PSG College of Arts and Science.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is satisfactory and well-maintained. The classrooms are spacious, clean and have proper seating with good ventilation. Most classrooms are equipped with projectors. The Wi-Fi facility is available across the campus, and the speed is pretty okay.

reviews.review_heading: Only a positive comment about this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available. Labs are provided for every related course. There is a library with a large number of books. Most of the hostel students are unhappy with the food supplied.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing college with so many facilities and with an eco-friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: Wonderful facilities with amazing infrastructure. The college has an eco-friendly environment. Everyone is so friendly and from various parts of the country. We can learn new things and adapt to the environment very easily. I would recommend this college to everyone.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: There were different types of hostels. Facilities for improvement in those hostels, including a single cot, bathrooms, and cupboards, are a must. There were common bathrooms there. A comfortable hostel with all facilities available, providing separate accommodation for boys and girls. An exclusive hostel is available for international students. The hostel has an exclusive library for inmates, and internet facilities are available. The food dining hall and kitchen offer a home-food type experienc...

reviews.review_heading: Placement training is just in the name and is not effective.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but Wi-Fi is very slow. The quality of food is good. Hostel rooms are neat and well-maintained. The health center is always active, and the Wi-Fi in the hostel is good. Classrooms are well-equipped with a projector. Classes are taken in a bilingual environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and the course because it provides a good quality of education.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like 2 large food courts, and food will also be of good quality at an affordable price. Projector is placed in every classroom, which helps the students to study very easily and efficiently. There is a water purifier on every floor, which is one of the important facilities provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Lab facility was available for my department, and classroom was big enough to sit. But library was common for all department students. Wi-Fi facility was only available in library. It provided attached bathroom facility, mess was available in hostel. Canteen was also available. Sports facilities were there. Many indoor and outdoor games were being played.

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best to get placed in.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available. The library has a good infrastructure department, which helps us to achieve anything related to our academics. The hostel facility is a bit less. Sports and games are encouraged well among the college. The canteen in the hostel is a little worse.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for M.Sc. in statistics course.
reviews.review_text: Compared to every other college, my college was the best. Classrooms were always clean and tidy. Many knowledgeable books were also provided by great authors in our library. Our own textbooks were also convenient in our college library. We also had a kitchen with fresh snacks and water. Every Saturday, there were performances. There was a separate room/hall for tennis, carrom, and more.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: It was the toughest course I ever attended or heard of someone. Every mark earned there in 3 years is hard-earned and a lot to learn. Professors there set a very high benchmark for students. Industry-level assignments are done in the course curriculum. Separate hostels are available for boys and girls. The rooms and infrastructure in the hostel are well-maintained the student's login and out registers are well-kept. Students are bound to follow the rules strictly. Mess and the food are neat and ...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms in the commerce block are very spacious and comfortable and they are well-maintained. Each floor has restrooms for both boys and girls and separate ones for staff members. There are 2 main canteens and 2 snack bars inside and there is also a mini stationary and sprint-out shop inside the college. The student Wi-Fi works well for certain app usage. The library has a variety of books which will be useful for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Completely satisfied with the placements. The canteen is available and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with clean classrooms and smart boards in all the classes. College Wi-Fi is available and lab facilities are very good. Library has all kinds of books for students to develop their knowledge. Hostel has neat rooms and well-mannered wardens. The food is also very nice. There are health centers to help us with sudden injuries. And they give more importance to sports and games like football, basketball, and also dance.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied with the money I paid for this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, everything was fine. 97% best infrastructure. I went to gone hostel with my friends I saw it. It was just like a house, and tutors. Hostel wardens are very friendly and mainly the mess food is very good. It was the no 1 in providing the best mess food.

reviews.review_heading: The experience at PSG College of Arts and Science
reviews.review_text: I choose this college for its beautiful campus and good hostel facilities. I choose this course only for its wonderful options, with many cultural events and many activities for life skills. I have to say this hostel is for NRI, known as the Non-Resident Indian hostel, but I am Indian because it was initially constructed for foreign students, but now it is available for all students in the college. It is shared by two persons in the room, and attached rooms are provided.

college_info.college_name: PSGCAS

data.description: Based on the five reviews provided, here's how the quality of teaching is perceived at PSG College of Arts and Science for the BA programme: 1. Well-qualified and knowledgeable faculty: All five reviewers praised the college's faculty members for their qualifications, friendliness and teaching skills. They described the teachers as "well-qualified," "helping," "patient," and "knowledgeable" in their respective departments. 2. Effective teaching methods: Reviewers noted that the faculty uses projectors and other modern tools to deliver engaging lectures and clear students' doubts effectively. This suggests that the teaching methods are innovative and tailored to meet the needs of the learners. 3. Personalized attention: Many reviewers highlighted the faculty's willingness to go the extra mile to ensure students understand the material. They mentioned that teachers are always available to clarify doubts and provide individualized attention when needed. 4. Strong industry connections: According to Noel , the course curriculum is designed by experienced industry professionals, indicating a strong connection between the academic programme and real-world applications. This could mean that students receive relevant training that prepares them well for their future careers. 5. High pass rates: All five reviews mentioned that the pass percentage for semester exams is high (ranging from 80% to 100%). This suggests that the teaching methods and assessment strategies are effective in helping students succeed academically.

college_info.college_name: PSGCAS Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The overall cost of BSc at PSG College of Arts and Science is INR 21,000 to INR 1.3 lakh. The BSc fee might include multiple component which must paid at the time of admission. Adittionally, candidates are required to pay application fees of INR 50 for each category (Aided / SF) of UG separately.

BSc admission is based on merit rank list prepared for Arts & Science streams (as per the subjects studied in 12th standard). If two applicants have obtained the same cut-off marks, then preference will be given to first come first serve applicant (i.e. for applicant who register their application first).

The total tuition fees for BSc is INR 30,000 - INR 2.70 lakh. This fees is taken from official website/ sanctioning body and may change. Candidates have to confirm their seat by paying the programme fees at the time of admission.

The total tuition fee for BSc in Visual Communication is INR 96,850. Admission to BSc in Visual Communication is merit-based. The application process for PSGAS BSc in Visual Communication begins on the day of the publication of Class 12 results. Candidates wanting to apply for a course can register themselves by entering the marks secured in Class 12/TNHSE board. Further, the steps involved in the PSGAS application process are as follows:
Step 1: Register with your contact number and password on the college’s official website.
Step 2: Login and enter your Class 12 marks.
Step 3: Press the “register” button and submit the application for the desired course.
After all the applications are received before the deadline. PSG College of Arts and Science releases a merit list to declare the names of the students selected for the course.

Yes, PSG College of Arts and Science offers scholarship does offers scholarships for its students. The scholarships offered are BC/MBC/DNC and BC (M), SC/SCA/ST Scholarship, Atal Bihari Vajpayee Scholarship, etc. The scholarships are offered to stduents family income does not exceeds to certain amount.The scholarships is only available for students who have are officially admitted to any programme of the college.

reviews_list.review_title: It provides very good professors and the best in teaching and other facilities.

review_content.Placements: No particular placements are conducted separately on campus. Most of the students opt for post-graduation and also choose to go abroad for higher studies. The students after completion of education move into the animal husbandry department whenever government releases notification for the recruitment of veterinary assistant surgeons.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped with a central library and also every department has its laboratory and equipment. Wi-Fi is present in the hostel and campus. The ground is present for sports and other activities which also contain a pavilion and indoor stadium. 3A, R&V, regt, NCC is present on the campus where horses are being trained under the supervision of both army men and also professors and junior doctors.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good faculty members and an environment.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2016 batch, and I will complete my course by January 2022. Currently, I am doing an internship. The college deals with life sciences, and there are no placements. Mostly, students prefer to opt for higher education like PG and other courses. Some students may prefer to do private-sector jobs related to animal husbandry and companions animals. Some of the students may start their entrepreneurial life by starting their own clinics, dairy farm, etc. Most of the students move into the animal husbandry department of the government of Andhra Pradesh which recruits students in regular intervals. The average salary offered ranges from 3.5-5 LPA for a fresher. There will be a compulsory internship program for all the students to receive their degrees.

review_summary.college_name: NTR College of Veterinary Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities but no placements.

content.Placements: NTR College of Veterinary Science is a government institution; hence, on-campus placement or job opportunities are little to none. Though this is a demanding course, government jobs are very limited. But you can still try in sectors like dairy corporations or open any private clinic.
content.Infrastructure: The bachelor course is 5 and half years long with highly qualified faculty. You will have regular labs with well-equipped instruments in all labs. The classrooms are designed for a strength of 90 members. We have other activities like sports and games, NCC and horseback riding for both boys and girls.

individual_reviews.user_name: T N S R K M SWAROOP
individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Nice college with good faculty .

content.Placements: Most of the students are recruited into animal husbandry department through Government notification whenever the notification is released. After passing out most of the students opt for their post graduation and also some of them move to abroad for their higher education and research purpose.
content.Infrastructure: College is well-equipped with separate laboratories for each department and all the essential equipment is present. College is comprised of three parts namely main building where all the non clinical departments are present and second one is instructional livestock farm complex where all the animals are housed along with land where essential fodder is cultivated for educational and training purpose. Third one is teaching veterinary clinical complex where all the clinical departments like medicine surgery gynaecology are present.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It provides very good professors and the best in teaching and other facilities.

content.Placements: No particular placements are conducted separately on campus. Most of the students opt for post-graduation and also choose to go abroad for higher studies. The students after completion of education move into the animal husbandry department whenever government releases notification for the recruitment of veterinary assistant surgeons.
content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped with a central library and also every department has its laboratory and equipment. Wi-Fi is present in the hostel and campus. The ground is present for sports and other activities which also contain a pavilion and indoor stadium. 3A, R&V, regt, NCC is present on the campus where horses are being trained under the supervision of both army men and also professors and junior doctors.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good faculty members and an environment.

content.Placements: I am from the 2016 batch, and I will complete my course by January 2022. Currently, I am doing an internship. The college deals with life sciences, and there are no placements. Mostly, students prefer to opt for higher education like PG and other courses. Some students may prefer to do private-sector jobs related to animal husbandry and companions animals. Some of the students may start their entrepreneurial life by starting their own clinics, dairy farm, etc. Most of the students move into the animal husbandry department of the government of Andhra Pradesh which recruits students in regular intervals. The average salary offered ranges from 3.5-5 LPA for a fresher. There will be a compulsory internship program for all the students to receive their degrees.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of NTR College of Veterinary Science.

content.Placements: This is a unique course in veterinary. In our batch, the total number of students available is 84. NTR College of Veterinary Science is a top college to complete UG in veterinary sciences. After completing the course, there are many opportunities for government jobs as well as private jobs. Overall, it is a good college to pursue BVSC.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms and labs have very well infrastructure. Here Wi-Fi is available on the entire campus area. Here there is a separate library for students. Hostels are also very good. Here many indoor and outdoor playgrounds are available for all sports and games. A separate gym is also available for the physical fitness of students.

highlights.summary:
Krupanidhi UG/PG 2025 Application Open, Submit Now

NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy, Krupanidhi Group of Institutions ranks #98 under the category 'Pharmacy'.

The KCET 2026 registration window for admission to the BE/BTech course is now closed. The KCET exam 2026 will be held on Apr 23 and Apr 24, 2026.

table.details: 98 by the NIRF under the Pharmacy category

college_info.intro: Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy popular programmes are Pharm.D and BPharm. BPharm students are taught Human Anatomy and Physiology, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Inorganic Chemistry, and several other subjects. Pharm.D students are placed in top companies at top positions. As a part of the practical training, there is Hospital Posting and Project work. Every student joining Pharm.D course go through the hospital posting. Students are placed in constituent hospitals and they must complete their duty in not less than seventy five hours to be covered in not less than 200 working days in each of third, second, and fourth year course. Hence, students come out of the college as well-trained professionals. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy offers PhD, UG, and PG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Pharmacy and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BPharm course to students. At the PG level, the college offers MPharm course to students. The college also provides PhD, DPharm, Pharm.D, and other courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It's good, but placements aren't very available. Job fairs are organized.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for our batch; they're scheduled for December, so we don't know about the packages. Last year, Hetero and Clinisol came for interviews. For internships, we have to find opportunities on our own. I went to Group Pharma in Malur for my internship. Roles available include pharmacist, production manager, and drug safety associate.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi isn't available. Classrooms are spacious, and the library is very good with all the necessary books. We can take only two books per card. The canteen is messy, and the food isn't that great but is acceptable. Medical facilities and sports activities are good. I'm a day scholar, so I don't know much about hostel life.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharm. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to study M.Pharm, but I am not satisfied because of placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placements for pharmacy students. Top recruiting companies visit our campus. Internships are provided after the completion of the course, and all students take part in them. All students are required to go to companies on their own.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is huge. A huge playground is available. Classrooms and labs are spacious. Sports facilities are good. A seminar hall is available. Our college has an indoor stadium to conduct programs. The hostel is good. The quality of the food in the mess is good. Medical facilities are available.

review_summary.college_name: Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy, Krupanidhi Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: The placement percentage for all colleges is different. As it is the best college in Karnataka, the placement percentage is 50-60%. Students who pass exams got internships. Many types of companies are available in the pharmacy course.
content.Infrastructure: It is the best college in Karnataka. Our college is near the railway station. In the college, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are present. The hostel and PG facilities are available. The hostel food is average.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good in the college. They help students in studying and practicals. A semester exam is the best in the college. It is the greatest time in students' lives.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am very much happy that I was a student of this college.

content.Placements: In my college, there was a job conductor for placements. About 60% of students in my batch were placed during the placement festival. Most of the companies, like Cipla, Gel Tech, Bioplus, and Apollo Pharmacy Clinical Trials, along with many top and local companies, attended the placement festival. This allowed us to meet various companies for placement. Top roles like pharmacist, analyst, and R&D department were options for the students.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by our college during my batch were very useful and helpful. The labs and classrooms were designed in a way that was beneficial for us. The library was filled with the books we needed. The hostel facilities were also very good, and the quality of the food available in the hostel and canteen was excellent in terms of hygiene. There was a sports committee that helped us stay fit.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's good, but placements aren't very available. Job fairs are organized.

content.Placements: There are no placements for our batch; they're scheduled for December, so we don't know about the packages. Last year, Hetero and Clinisol came for interviews. For internships, we have to find opportunities on our own. I went to Group Pharma in Malur for my internship. Roles available include pharmacist, production manager, and drug safety associate.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi isn't available. Classrooms are spacious, and the library is very good with all the necessary books. We can take only two books per card. The canteen is messy, and the food isn't that great but is acceptable. Medical facilities and sports activities are good. I'm a day scholar, so I don't know much about hostel life.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to study M.Pharm, but I am not satisfied because of placements.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placements for pharmacy students. Top recruiting companies visit our campus. Internships are provided after the completion of the course, and all students take part in them. All students are required to go to companies on their own.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is huge. A huge playground is available. Classrooms and labs are spacious. Sports facilities are good. A seminar hall is available. Our college has an indoor stadium to conduct programs. The hostel is good. The quality of the food in the mess is good. Medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college needs to improve its placement record.

content.Placements: The college claims to provide good placements but there are none offered. The placement scenario here is not so good. After completing the course, students can search for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Lab are good, clean, and well maintained. The canteen food is average but the hostel facility is good. Sports facilities are good for basketball. There is a lot of greenery at the center of the college. Classrooms are large with blackboard and projector screen.
content.Faculty: Professors are good and highly qualified. Notes are given to students on time. The passing percentage is 50 of 100. The course curriculum taught is relevant to make students work in industries and pharmacies. Regular tests are taken for practice.
