admission_process.title: Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy admissionsare merit-based. To be eligible for admission to any courses, candidates are required to fill out the criteria set by the college i.e. pass Class 12 for UG and diploma courses and pass graduation degree for PG courses.Krupanidhi College of PharmacyunderKrupanidhi Group of Institutionsoffers seven courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in the Pharmacy stream. The institute offers courses in affiliation withRajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences, Karnataka. Candidates must apply online for their preferred programme.To apply for admission, candidates are required to visit the college website to apply for admission. Go through the below article for more detailed information aboutKrupanidhi College of Pharmacyadmission 2025,along with course-wise eligibility, selection, course fee, and seat intake:

Candidates who want to apply for admission must fulfil the Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy admission admission criteria requirements for all the courses. Admission to all the courses is based on last qualifying exam scores. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to apply by visiting the college's official website or visiting the college campus directly. Below are theKrupanidhi College of Pharmacy coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
PUC/ Class 12/ PDC/ Intermediate/ HSc exam in Science
Vocational courses with Physics,Chemistry&Biology/ Mathematics conducted by the Government of Kerala only

Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy admission process includes registration, selection and fee payment. Candidates must first apply for the course of their choice followed by the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in the college:
STEP 1: Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy Application Process 2025

Candidates can fill out the application form on the college's official website. Aspirants must first register with the basic details to generate login credentials and then fill out the application form. Candidates will also need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection
Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy admission to all the courses is direct. Applicants are selected based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment
Once the selection is done, candidates need to bring the specified documents for verification. They further need to pay Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy fees to confirm their seat in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Krupanidhi College of Pharmacy, Krupanidhi Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: It is the best college in Karnataka. Our college is near the railway station. In the college, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are present. The hostel and PG facilities are available. The hostel food is average.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much happy that I was a student of this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by our college during my batch were very useful and helpful. The labs and classrooms were designed in a way that was beneficial for us. The library was filled with the books we needed. The hostel facilities were also very good, and the quality of the food available in the hostel and canteen was excellent in terms of hygiene. There was a sports committee that helped us stay fit.

reviews.review_heading: It's good, but placements aren't very available. Job fairs are organized.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi isn't available. Classrooms are spacious, and the library is very good with all the necessary books. We can take only two books per card. The canteen is messy, and the food isn't that great but is acceptable. Medical facilities and sports activities are good. I'm a day scholar, so I don't know much about hostel life.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study M.Pharm, but I am not satisfied because of placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge. A huge playground is available. Classrooms and labs are spacious. Sports facilities are good. A seminar hall is available. Our college has an indoor stadium to conduct programs. The hostel is good. The quality of the food in the mess is good. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs to improve its placement record.
reviews.review_text: Lab are good, clean, and well maintained. The canteen food is average but the hostel facility is good. Sports facilities are good for basketball. There is a lot of greenery at the center of the college. Classrooms are large with blackboard and projector screen.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with this college because of faculty. It has good placements in 2022 and really go
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good lab, a good library with plenty of space around and a good eco-friendly environment. The quality of food available in canteen is above average and they can be late in delivering the food and the taste is below average. It has sports courts .

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. Hostels, canteen, etc. are inside the campus only. Hostel is hygienic and well maintained. Those who want to stay at advanced level can choose international rooms also, in the hostel. Canteen provides average level of food.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure with good staffs.
reviews.review_text: This college has around 5-6 blocks which are segregated as puc block, degree block, pharmacy block, MBA block and canteen. Labs are very good maintained with all proper equipment. Canteen is okay with its food. Library has a huge collection of books and clean .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its teachers, placements, infrastructure, education, etc.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the hostel are good. The Wi-Fi is available and laboratories. The classroom and library are also available. The quality of facility in our hostel is good and food available in the canteen is also very good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for pharmacy.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure was very good the college is widely spread with many buildings and ground it has all labs and big library. 
The college has a canteen and medical facilities. The college perform sports in its own huge ground and the college is full of greenery.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with good faculty and placements. Infrastructure and facilities were not that great.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library were good. I was not satisfied with the lab instruments, as most of them were not working properly. During my tenure, there was no Wi-Fi facility, and I don't know about the present condition. The food served in the canteen was horrible, not at all good. Hostel room was average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with good placements, high-quality education, and attractive infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides free Wi-Fi facility. Even there are well-equipped labs and classrooms. Apart from that, playgrounds for sports are available. The canteen available in college is good. Hostel rooms give a feeling of homely atmosphere. Infrastructure is absolutely amazing. So I enjoyed those college days.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied to some extent.
reviews.review_text: The college provides advanced instruments for usage with free Wi-Fi access. Classrooms are quite good. Canteen is getting better day by day, but the food served is average. Hostel rooms are at an average level, and we had issues with water facilities. However, our college has provided us with a mini mart and stationery shops which are really helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Overall an average college and need to improve really well.
reviews.review_text: Labs in the college don't have appropriate instruments. Classrooms aren't air-conditioned. The food served in the canteen is average. Hostel rooms are average. I don't have an idea about Wi-Fi as I haven't used it. The library is just okay. Sports are conducted every year, but it isn't given much importance as given in arts colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text:
Labs and classrooms are good, and the quality of the food offered in the canteen is good. Hostel rooms are good with good infrastructure. There is a good library, and it is providing almost all the facilities for students.
I didn't face any issues regarding the infrastructure of our college. The campus environment is eco-friendly and pleasing.

highlights.summary: School of Allied Health Sciences, Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Medical College and Hospitals Campus is a private institute in Salem, Tamil Nadu. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 29 courses across 12 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular School of Allied Health Sciences, Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Medical College and Hospitals Campus programs include B.Sc., M.Sc., UG Diploma, MPH and BOPTM. School of Allied Health Sciences, Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Medical College and Hospitals Campus courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 590 students. The fees at School of Allied Health Sciences, Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Medical College and Hospitals Campus ranges between INR 70,000 to 5,10,000 for the different courses. School of Allied Health Sciences, Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Medical College and Hospitals Campus placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 4,00,000. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Forensic Science Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Life at Vinayaka University.

review_content.Placements: Placements are about individual skills. If students have extra certification and skills, they get first preference for placements. Maintaining a good CGPA also matters a lot. The highest package will be around 10 LPA. The lowest package will be 3 LPA.
review_content.Faculty: There are two internals conducted for each semester where we can get passing marks. Semester exams are a little bit difficult. The passing percentage will be so difficult compared to other courses. The course will be fantastic compared to other courses. We get a lot of real-time exposure. Our class strength is only 20, so there are not many faculty members allotted for our branch. The same faculty teaches 2 to 3 subjects. The hostel is so good but the food in the hostel is so bad. We can't keep it in the mouth. Sometimes, it will be overcooked and smelly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The life of the students on the college campus.

review_content.Placements: 30 students are placed in my department. Minimum package is 75000, which is a low amount compared to other colleges. Many companies are deal with the college. Internships are also available at this college. The college provides extracurricular activities for the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library is also available in this college. The hostel also provided for the students. The sports are conducted in the college. Labs are available in this college. In the 2nd or 3rd year, the students are posted in the hospital for practical learning.
